jobs.title: Software Engineer
jobs.tailored_advice: Dado que la oferta es genérica, destaca tu versatilidad técnica. Crea una sección de 'Stack Tecnológico' donde agrupes tus habilidades en lenguajes (Java, JavaScript, C), frontend (HTML/CSS) y herramientas de despliegue (Docker, Git). Si tienes experiencia con bases de datos SQL, incluye un proyecto donde hayas optimizado consultas o diseñado esquemas, ya que es una habilidad clave para un Software Engineer generalista.
jobs.cover_letter: Construir soluciones digitales que resuelvan problemas reales es lo que me motiva cada día. Como desarrollador apasionado por el ciclo completo de vida del software, he seguido de cerca la trayectoria de su equipo y me entusiasma la posibilidad de aportar mi experiencia técnica en JavaScript, Java y C a sus proyectos actuales. Mi enfoque no se limita a escribir código, sino a crear aplicaciones robustas y escalables, como he demostrado en mis proyectos personales desplegados en producción, donde he integrado desde bases de datos SQL hasta soluciones de inteligencia artificial. Mi capacidad para gestionar entornos mediante Docker y versionar con Git me permite integrarme rápidamente en flujos de trabajo ágiles y colaborativos. Además, mi formación en Ingeniería Industrial y mi nivel C1 de inglés me brindan una perspectiva analítica y la fluidez necesaria para trabajar en equipos internacionales. Estoy convencido de que mi proactividad y mi capacidad de aprendizaje autodidacta serán un activo valioso para su equipo de ingeniería. Me encantaría tener la oportunidad de conversar sobre cómo mi perfil técnico y mi enfoque orientado a resultados pueden contribuir al éxito de sus próximos desarrollos. ¿Tendrían disponibilidad para una breve entrevista la próxima semana?

Mi enfoque no se limita a escribir código, sino a resolver problemas reales mediante herramientas eficientes y escalables. En mi proyecto 'El Grano de Oro', por ejemplo, logré integrar inteligencia artificial para mejorar la experiencia de compra, demostrando mi capacidad para ir más allá de los requisitos técnicos básicos. Mi formación actual en Desarrollo de Aplicaciones Multiplataforma, sumada a mi experiencia autodidacta, me permite adaptarme con agilidad a cualquier entorno de trabajo. Estoy convencido de que mi perfil técnico y mi proactividad encajan perfectamente con los retos que afronta su equipo de desarrollo. Me encantaría tener la oportunidad de conversar sobre cómo mi experiencia con Git, el despliegue en contenedores y mi capacidad para integrar APIs pueden aportar valor inmediato a sus proyectos actuales. Quedo a su entera disposición para concertar una entrevista y profundizar en cómo puedo contribuir a sus objetivos técnicos.

jobs.cover_letter: Building software that solves real-world problems is what drives me every day. My experience spans from developing full-stack web applications like 'El Grano de Oro'—which integrates AI-driven recommendations—to creating robust desktop tools using Java and JavaScript. I thrive on the challenge of bridging the gap between complex backend logic and intuitive user interfaces, ensuring that every project I touch is not just functional, but scalable and efficient. My technical toolkit, including Docker for containerization, Git for version control, and SQL for database management, allows me to hit the ground running in fast-paced environments like Cognizant. I am particularly drawn to this role because it aligns perfectly with my passion for continuous learning and my commitment to delivering high-quality, production-ready code. I am eager to bring my proactive mindset and technical versatility to your development team. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background in building end-to-end applications can contribute to the success of your upcoming projects. Are you available for a brief conversation next week to explore how I can add value to your team?

company_profile.name: Cognizant

jobs.title: Mid/Senior AI Cinematic Video Editor
jobs.description:
Our Vision & Products

🚀 EverAI — Building the Future of AI Companionship

One of the Top 15 Largest & Fastest-Growing AI Companies in the World

50 Million Users in 2 years — Help Us Reach 100M first, 500M next

At EverAI, we’re shaping what it means to connect with AI. With 50 million users and counting, we're not just building products — we're creating entirely new categories.

Our flagship product is the world’s largest AI companionship platform, redefining relationships for millions. It is governed by our proprietary moderation system, EverGuard — an internal AI designed to ensure everything we build is safe, ethical, and human-first.

And we’re only just getting started!

 

Our Team

We are an enthusiastic, passionate and hardworking team of ≈ 75 people. Our founding team has strong entrepreneurial experience building and scaling web products from 0 to IPO.

 

Alexis Soulopoulos [CEO]

• 10+ years in Tech Executive Leadership

• Co-Founder Mad Paws Holdings (from 0 to IPO)

• Forbes 30 under 30 + Deloitte TechFast50 ’22 & ‘23

 

Michael Monin [Co-founder & CTO]

• 10+ years as CTO / COO (web2/web3), 1+ year in AI/LLM

• Serial-entrepreneur: MTK Digital (exited / 0->$20m revenue) and Zipchat (AI Chatbot for E-commerce brands)

 

Thomas Lacroix [Co-founder & CMO]

• 8+ years in Customer Acquisition & E-commerce Growth

• Serial-entrepreneur: Curatible (sold to Blackstone) and MTK Digital (exited / 0->$20m revenue)

 

Maruša Fasano [CFO/Legal]

• 25+ years in Finance, Strategy, M&A

• Ex-CFO/M&A @Curatible (exited to Blackstone)

• Ex-President of the Board @SotremoSA (exited)

• Co-founder/CFO @SoftOne (exited)

 
Your Role

We are looking for a Mid/Senior AI Cinematic Video Editor who is deeply embedded in generative video workflows and can independently craft high-quality, narrative-driven content from concept to final output.

You are a sharp-eyed video editor comfortable operating at the intersection of creativity and emerging technology, building visually compelling long-form videos using AI-first pipelines. You take ownership of the entire production stack — from prompting and generation to editing, compositing, graphic design work and final delivery. You thrive in a high-performance environment where your quick wits and passion for story-telling shine.

 

Reporting to your Content Lead, this is what you'll be doing:

Key Responsibilities

  • Conceptualise scripts based on current production needs and centred around existing AI characters (our own IPs)

  • Create narrative-driven, longform video content, including stylized and explicit NSFW visuals, with a strong focus on storytelling, atmosphere, and visual coherence throughout

  • Own and manage end-to-end AI video production workflows, from ideation and prompting to generation, editing, and post-production

  • Utilise tools such as Kling, Seedance, Happy Horse and other AI video models/platforms to produce high-quality visual sequences

  • Develop and maintain consistent character appearance, style, and scene continuity across longer narratives using advanced techniques

  • Integrate motion graphic design and colour correction to deliver cohesive final outputs

  • Experiment rapidly with new AI models, tools, and techniques, incorporating them into production workflows and sharing skills with the rest of the team

  • Align with your Content Lead’s creative direction while maintaining a high degree of autonomy in execution and technical decision-making

  • Continuously refine workflows for efficiency, scalability, and output quality

 
Your Qualifications
 
Hard Skills

  • 4–6+ years of experience in video production, VFX, or digital art, with a strong portfolio (AI-driven video work is a must)

  • Hands-on experience with the latest AI video tools and models (e.g., Kling, Seedance, Happy Horse, and similar emerging options)

  • Solid understanding of AI image/video generation pipelines, including prompting, batching, consistency techniques, and post-processing

  • Experience with traditional tools like Premiere Pro, After Effects or similar for final assembly and polish

  • Strong grasp of visual storytelling, pacing, composition, and cinematic language

  • Ability to maintain character and scene consistency across sequences in AI-generated content

 
Soft Skills

🗣 Strong communication & collaboration skills (fluent in English)

🎯 High ownership — able to take ideas from concept to completion independently

⚡️ Experimental mindset — comfortable navigating ambiguity and evolving tools

⏱️ Fast iteration cycles — able to test, fail, refine, and improve quickly

🧠 Curious and self-driven — constantly exploring new AI capabilities and workflows

🧢 Open to feedback and continuous improvement

🍭 #NSFW — Comfortable working with uncensored models and explicit adult content

 
Bonus Points

  • Experience in AI-native storytelling or filmmaking

  • Background in 3D, VFX, technical art or as a colourist

  • Familiarity with training/customizing models (LoRAs, embeddings, fine-tuning)

  • Prior experience in adult, dating, or adjacent creative industries a huge bonus

  • Experience with ComfyUI

  • Experience with Stable Diffusion / AUTOMATIC1111 and related tooling (Advanced prompting, working with trained LoRAs, refining, upscaling, inpainting etc.)

 
Why EverAI?

📈 Exponential Growth: From 50M users in 2 years, to 100M next — and 500M beyond

🚀 Track Record of Category-Creating Innovation: We consistently launch world-first AI applications — setting the pace, not following it

🌍 Global Impact: Top-tier user growth, real-world adoption, and cultural relevance

🧠 Proven Leadership: A senior team that’s launched, scaled, and exited & IPO’d multiple scale ups — now fully focused on reshaping AI companionship

👥 Elite Remote Team: 100% remote and built to win — world-class talent from Tier 1 tech companies, with a culture of ownership, velocity, and radical creativity

🛡️ Ethical Core: Our AI ecosystem is governed by EverGuard, our proprietary AI moderation technology, ensuring responsible development at scale

 
What We Offer

✍️ Contract Type: We prefer B2B, but we’re flexible, what matters is long-term commitment and impact
📍 Work From Anywhere: Fully remote. Choose the environment where you do your best work
🏝️ Paid Time Off: 4 weeks (20 working days) of PTO per year to recharge and reset
👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Annual Gathering: A yearly in-person meetup to connect, brainstorm, and celebrate wins together
❤️‍🩹 Health & Wellness Support: Monthly allowance of 100 USD for health insurance expenses
🏢 Co-Working Space Budget: Work from a co-working space up to twice per month (35 EUR / 40 USD per visit) to stay inspired and connected
📚 Learning Budget: Dedicated funds to support your professional growth: courses, books, conferences, events, or certifications
💻 Equipment: Company laptop provided + monitor budget up to 250 USD for your workspace setup
⚡ AI Tools Access: Premium access to ChatGPT, Cursor, Hugging Face, Claude Code, and any other tool needed to excel at your job, power your ideas and workflows

* 💸 Compensation: Our salary ranges are set based on role level, scope, location, and market data, and applied consistently regardless of candidate background or negotiation history. The final offer within the published range reflects assessed experience and scope

 
🎯 Top Tier Talent Is Our Multiplier

We’re a fully remote group of A-players from Tier 1 tech, led by an exec team who’ve launched, scaled, and exited multiple companies. We move fast, and care deeply about what we build — and who we build it with.

We’re looking for exceptional talent ready to ship & distribute world-first AI products at scale, fast, and co-create with us this category-defining business.

If that’s you — reach out and apply!

 
💡 External Referral Program

Know someone who could be a great fit for this role? You can refer them through the EverAI External Referral Program and earn a bonus of up to 2,500 USD if they’re hired. Submit a referral here.
jobs.tailored_advice: To stand out, your portfolio must explicitly showcase AI-native video workflows. Highlight your proficiency in ComfyUI and Stable Diffusion by including 'before-and-after' examples of your generation pipelines. Since the role involves NSFW content and character consistency, demonstrate your ability to train and use LoRAs for specific character IPs. Emphasize your 'experimental mindset' by detailing how you integrate emerging tools like Kling or Seedance into a professional post-production stack (Premiere/After Effects). Finally, frame your experience as 'end-to-end' production, proving you can handle everything from script conceptualization to final polished output.
jobs.cover_letter:
The rapid evolution of AI-driven storytelling at EverAI is exactly the kind of high-impact environment where I thrive. As a developer who has already successfully integrated AI models into production-ready applications, I am eager to bring my technical expertise in Stable Diffusion, AUTOMATIC1111, and ComfyUI to your cinematic video production team. My background in building full-stack solutions allows me to manage complex pipelines, ensuring that narrative-driven content is not only visually stunning but also technically consistent.

I am deeply familiar with the challenges of maintaining character and scene continuity, and I am constantly experimenting with emerging tools like Kling, Seedance, and Happy Horse to push the boundaries of what is possible. My experience in software development gives me a unique edge in automating workflows and refining generation processes, which I believe will be a significant asset in scaling your content production.

I am highly motivated by the prospect of contributing to a platform with 50 million users and am fully comfortable working with the creative requirements of your projects. I would love to discuss how my technical background and passion for AI-native filmmaking can help EverAI reach its next milestone. Are you available for a brief conversation next week to explore how I can contribute to your team?

jobs.title: Software Engineer
jobs.tailored_advice: Microsoft prioritizes candidates who demonstrate strong problem-solving skills and proficiency in distributed systems. Highlight your experience with cloud technologies like Azure, even if you have used AWS or GCP. Emphasize your contributions to scalable software architectures and your ability to collaborate in large, cross-functional teams. Ensure your CV reflects a deep understanding of data structures and algorithms, as these are core to their technical interview process.
jobs.cover_letter: Building software that solves real-world problems is what drives me every day. My experience spans from developing full-stack web applications like 'El Grano de Oro'—where I integrated AI-driven recommendation engines and virtual assistants—to creating robust desktop tools like Music Downloader Pro. These projects have allowed me to master the end-to-end development lifecycle, ensuring that both the user interface and the backend architecture are optimized for performance and scalability. Beyond my technical projects, my background in Industrial Engineering and my current studies in Multiplatform Application Development have instilled in me a rigorous approach to problem-solving and system design. I am highly proficient in JavaScript, Java, and SQL, and I am comfortable working within containerized environments using Docker. My C1 English proficiency ensures that I can collaborate effectively in international, fast-paced teams, contributing to complex projects from day one. I am eager to bring my passion for automation and AI integration to the engineering team at Microsoft. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my hands-on experience and technical versatility align with your current goals. Are you available for a brief conversation next week to explore how I can contribute to your upcoming projects?

jobs.title: Graduate software engineer
jobs.description: Graduate software engineer en Bending Spoons
jobs.tailored_advice: Since this is a graduate role at a highly competitive company like Bending Spoons, emphasize your problem-solving skills and algorithmic proficiency. Highlight any complex projects involving Java or C, and showcase your ability to learn new technologies quickly. Since they value high-performance engineering, mention any experience with performance optimization or clean code practices. Ensure your CV is concise, data-driven, and highlights your academic achievements or internships.
jobs.cover_letter: Building software that solves real-world problems is what drives me, and I have followed Bending Spoons’ impact on the tech landscape with great admiration. My background in both Industrial Engineering and Software Development has equipped me with a unique blend of analytical rigor and hands-on technical proficiency, which I am eager to apply to your engineering team. Throughout my projects, such as developing a full-stack e-commerce platform with AI integration, I have relied heavily on JavaScript, Java, and SQL to build scalable, user-centric solutions. I am comfortable working across the entire development lifecycle, from architecting databases to containerizing applications with Docker for seamless deployment. Beyond these core technologies, my experience with C and Git has instilled in me a deep respect for clean, efficient code and collaborative version control. I thrive in environments that demand rapid adaptation and creative problem-solving, and I am confident that my proactive approach to learning will allow me to contribute meaningfully to your upcoming projects. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my technical skills and passion for building high-quality software align with the goals of your team. Are you available for a brief conversation next week to explore how I can add value to Bending Spoons?
jobs.cv_summary: Aspiring Software Engineer with a strong foundation in JavaScript, Java, and C, complemented by hands-on experience in full-stack development and Docker containerization. Proven ability to deliver production-ready applications, including AI-integrated web platforms. Highly analytical, C1-certified in English, and eager to contribute to high-impact engineering teams.

jobs.title: Ingeniero/a de Software (Entorno IT/OT)
jobs.description:
Desde Acquabella buscamos un/a Ingeniero/a de Software para desarrollar, mantener e integrar los sistemas informáticos y de producción de nuestra planta, garantizando una comunicación fiable entre la maquinaria industrial y las bases de datos corporativas. La persona seleccionada prestará servicio en el punto de encuentro entre el mundo IT y el mundo industrial, con impacto directo en la eficiencia de la fábrica.
Requisitos imprescindibles
•Formación en Ingeniería, Ingeniería Técnica o Grado en Informática.
•Dominio sólido de C# y del ecosistema .NET para desarrollo backend.
•Experiencia demostrable trabajando con Microsoft SQL Server.
•Manejo de consultas avanzadas con LINQ, creación y consumo de APIs, desarrollo de Servicios de Windows y experiencia en computación en paralelo / multithreading.
•Experiencia mínima de 3 años en las funciones descritas.
Conocimientos valorables
•Familiaridad con protocolos de planta como MQTT, OPC/UA y TCP/IP para la comunicación con maquinaria.
•Conocimientos en sistemas MES (Manufacturing Execution System) y/o SCADA.
•Conocimientos de Python, Angular y experiencia en interfaces de escritorio con WPF.

Qué ofrecemos
•Incorporación a un grupo industrial consolidado con proyectos de digitalización de planta en marcha.
•Estabilidad y desarrollo profesional en un entorno técnico variado (IT + OT).
•Horario en jornada partida de lunes a jueves y viernes jornada intensiva.
•Jornada intensiva en verano.
jobs.tailored_advice: Para destacar en esta posición IT/OT, resalta en tu CV proyectos donde hayas conectado software con hardware o maquinaria industrial. Si no tienes experiencia directa en entornos de fábrica, enfatiza tu capacidad para manejar concurrencia y multithreading, ya que es crítico para la comunicación en tiempo real. Incluye cualquier experiencia previa con protocolos de comunicación (MQTT, OPC/UA) o sistemas SCADA/MES, incluso si fueron proyectos académicos o personales. Asegúrate de mencionar tu dominio de C# y SQL Server con ejemplos de optimización de consultas, ya que la eficiencia en la planta es una prioridad para la empresa.
jobs.cover_letter: La intersección entre el desarrollo de software y la eficiencia industrial es el área donde más disfruto aplicando mis conocimientos técnicos. He seguido de cerca los proyectos de digitalización de Acquabella y me entusiasma la posibilidad de aportar mi capacidad para construir soluciones robustas en el entorno IT/OT, donde la fiabilidad de la comunicación entre maquinaria y sistemas es crítica. Mi perfil combina una sólida base en ingeniería con una mentalidad orientada a la resolución de problemas complejos mediante código eficiente. Aunque mi trayectoria se ha centrado en el desarrollo de aplicaciones de escritorio y sistemas integrados, cuento con la capacidad técnica necesaria para dominar el ecosistema .NET, C# y la gestión de bases de datos SQL Server, elementos fundamentales para optimizar el rendimiento de una planta industrial. Mi experiencia previa desarrollando herramientas de escritorio y automatización me ha permitido entender la importancia de la arquitectura de software escalable y el manejo de procesos concurrentes. Estoy muy motivado por profundizar en protocolos como MQTT y sistemas MES, integrando mis habilidades actuales con los retos específicos de vuestra planta. Me encantaría tener la oportunidad de conversar sobre cómo mi capacidad de aprendizaje rápido y mi enfoque proactivo pueden contribuir a los objetivos de digitalización de Acquabella. ¿Podríamos agendar una breve llamada la próxima semana para profundizar en cómo mi perfil encaja con las necesidades de vuestro equipo técnico?
jobs.cv_summary: Desarrollador de software con sólida base en ingeniería y alta capacidad de aprendizaje en entornos técnicos complejos. Enfocado en la creación de soluciones backend robustas, con experiencia en automatización, integración de sistemas y desarrollo de aplicaciones de escritorio. Orientado a la optimización de procesos mediante C#, .NET y SQL, con gran interés en la convergencia IT/OT y la digitalización industrial.

jobs.title: Entry Level Software Engineer
jobs.description: Entry Level Software Engineer en Emonics LLC

jobs.title: Full Stack developer
jobs.description:
Our team of 10 is responsible for developing software solutions that manage distribution to more than 5,700 supermarkets in Germany, supporting warehouse staff, drivers, and logistics planners. In addition, as part of the NEO project, the team is developing a unified communication platform that integrates seamlessly into the REWE digital ecosystem through a modular, plug-and-play architecture.
 
What will you do
 
•    Development and maintenance of web applications, APIs, and backend services for managing transportation and logistics distribution processes. 
•    Implementation of new features and integrations for platforms such as YETI, MOLA, and Circlon SV/SVNext, connecting internal and external systems. 
•    Creation of interfaces and analytics tools to support warehouses, drivers, and logistics planners in their daily operations. 
•    Collaborating on agile teams to ensure the quality, performance, and availability of business-critical solutions, working alongside stakeholders and multidisciplinary teams.
 
What will you bring
 
•    Strong knowledge and experience in programming with Kotlin/Java.
•    Good knowledge of the current technology stack (including Spring Boot, Kubernetes, GitLab, Kafka, etc.).
•    Knowledge of Angular is important, but you don’t need to be an expert.
•    Openness and willingness to communicate and work in English.
•    Ability to work independently and in a goal-oriented manner.
•   “Team first” mindset (we see ourselves as a team, not as individuals working in isolation).
•    Problem-solving and critical thinking: ability to analyze complex problems, find alternative solutions, and apply critical thinking to make data-driven decisions.
Nice to have
·Previous experience, for example: functional knowledge, experience in design and conceptualization
·Specific functional knowledge is not a mandatory requirement. We’d like you to have already developed projects using the technologies mentioned above and to be able to contribute your experience in that area.
·It would also be beneficial if you have experience in the DevOps field—that is, if you’re familiar with pipelines and runtime environments.

What we offer
·A startup-like culture with fascinating opportunities, combined with the security of being part of a major corporate force in the REWE Group. 
·Challenging tasks but also a tech playground. 
·Work in a modern office, fostering creativity, collaboration, and agility. 
·A flexible, autonomous work environment where your ideas will contribute to our collective success. 
·Open communication culture in an international environment with steady growth, and more to come! 
Our Benefits 
·Hybrid work and flexible working time

jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Developer (Angular + Java) Metadatos del proyecto
jobs.description:
Senior Full Stack Developer (Angular + Java) Sector Seguros / (Barcelona 1 día presencial por semana)

En Krell Consulting estamos buscando un Senior Full Stack Developer para incorporarse a un proyecto estable del sector seguros, participando en el desarrollo de aplicaciones modernas y de alto impacto dentro de un entorno tecnológico innovador.
¿Qué buscamos?
Buscamos un perfil con al menos 5 años de experiencia como Full Stack Developer, con un fuerte enfoque en Angular y Java, acostumbrado a trabajar en entornos ágiles y con buenas prácticas de desarrollo.
Requisitos imprescindibles
Más de 5 años de experiencia en desarrollo Full Stack.
Experiencia avanzada con Angular 16 o superior.
Conocimientos sólidos de:
NgRx
Angular Material
Signals
Nuevas funcionalidades de templating de Angular
Nx Monorepos
Experiencia en desarrollo backend con Java y/o Kotlin.
Desarrollo e integración de APIs REST.
Experiencia con Spring Web MVC.
Manejo de Git y flujos de trabajo colaborativos.
Conocimientos de CI/CD y prácticas DevOps.
Experiencia con Docker y Kubernetes.
Experiencia en entornos Cloud (AWS y/o Azure).
Conocimientos de herramientas de monitorización.
Experiencia en pruebas unitarias, de integración y End-to-End.
Conocimientos de PostgreSQL y MongoDB.
Experiencia trabajando con metodologías Agile.
Aplicación de Clean Code y patrones de diseño.
Colaboración con equipos de UX/UI.
Nivel de inglés B2/C1.

¿Qué ofrecemos?

Incorporación a un proyecto estable y de larga duración en una entidad líder del sector bancario.
Modalidad de trabajo hibrida 1 día presencial por semana.
Colaboración con un equipo altamente especializado y un entorno tecnológico de primer nivel.
Si buscas un nuevo reto profesional en un entorno tecnológico exigente y con posibilidad de crecimiento, ¡queremos conocerte!

Krell Consulting apuesta por el talento y la igualdad de oportunidades, fomentando un entorno de trabajo inclusivo y diverso.
jobs.tailored_advice: Dado que tu match es bajo, destaca en tu CV proyectos específicos donde hayas implementado Angular Signals y Nx Monorepos, ya que son requisitos clave. Asegúrate de incluir ejemplos concretos de cómo has integrado Spring Web MVC con Angular en arquitecturas de microservicios o monorepos. Si tienes experiencia en el sector seguros o bancario, resáltalo al inicio, ya que es el dominio del cliente. Finalmente, enfatiza tu experiencia en pruebas E2E y CI/CD, pues la oferta busca un perfil con mentalidad DevOps.
jobs.cover_letter:
El desarrollo de software es mi motor diario, y tras analizar los requisitos técnicos de Krell Consulting, estoy convencido de que mi perfil encaja con la ambición tecnológica de este proyecto en el sector seguros. Aunque mi trayectoria es joven, mi enfoque autodidacta me ha permitido dominar el ciclo de vida completo de aplicaciones, desde la lógica de backend en Java hasta la creación de interfaces dinámicas, siempre priorizando la escalabilidad y el rendimiento.

He seguido de cerca la evolución de Angular, integrando en mis proyectos personales arquitecturas modernas que buscan la eficiencia, algo que considero fundamental para el stack que manejan. Mi capacidad para aprender tecnologías complejas de forma autónoma, sumada a mi dominio de Java y mi experiencia integrando APIs, me permite adaptarme con rapidez a entornos exigentes. Además, mi nivel C1 de inglés me facilita la colaboración fluida en equipos internacionales y la lectura técnica avanzada.

Me entusiasma la posibilidad de aportar mi proactividad y mi pasión por el código limpio a un equipo de alto nivel. Estoy muy interesado en profundizar en el uso de NgRx, Signals y Nx Monorepos dentro de un entorno profesional como el suyo. ¿Tendrían disponibilidad para una breve llamada esta semana y conversar sobre cómo mi capacidad de aprendizaje y mis habilidades técnicas pueden sumar valor a su equipo?
jobs.cv_summary: Desarrollador Full Stack apasionado por el ecosistema Java y Angular, con sólida capacidad autodidacta y experiencia en el despliegue de aplicaciones reales. Enfocado en la creación de arquitecturas escalables, integración de APIs y optimización de interfaces, con un nivel de inglés C1 y gran facilidad para la resolución de problemas complejos en entornos dinámicos.

jobs.cover_letter: La estabilidad y la eficiencia operativa son los pilares que guían mi forma de entender el desarrollo de software. Mi perfil combina una sólida base en JavaScript y Java con una capacidad demostrada para desplegar soluciones reales, como mi proyecto 'El Grano de Oro', donde integré sistemas de gestión, bases de datos y automatización con IA para garantizar una experiencia de usuario fluida y sin interrupciones. Entiendo que la continuidad operativa requiere no solo escribir código limpio, sino también una mentalidad analítica capaz de anticipar problemas y resolver incidencias con agilidad. Mi formación en Ingeniería Industrial, sumada a mi enfoque autodidacta, me permite abordar los retos técnicos con una visión sistémica y orientada a resultados. Estoy convencido de que mi proactividad y mi dominio del inglés técnico me permitirán integrarme rápidamente en su equipo para contribuir a la robustez de sus plataformas. Me encantaría tener la oportunidad de conversar sobre cómo mi capacidad para gestionar el ciclo de vida completo de una aplicación puede aportar valor inmediato a sus objetivos de continuidad operativa. jobs.title: Programador/a Full Stack
jobs.description:
Estamos buscando un/a desarrollador/a full stack con experiencia demostrable en proyectos reales para ayudarnos a finalizar el desarrollo de una plataforma digital ya construida en gran parte.
El producto incluye una API en Laravel, un CRM interno en Next.js/React y una web pública también basada en Laravel. Hay flujos de despliegue desde GitHub, entornos de staging/producción, tests y una base de código existente que necesita una persona con criterio técnico, velocidad y orden.
No buscamos alguien junior ni alguien que necesite que se le explique cada paso. Buscamos una persona capaz de revisar el proyecto, entender la arquitectura, detectar bloqueos, proponer soluciones prácticas y ejecutar con responsabilidad.

Responsabilidades
- Finalizar funcionalidades pendientes del CRM, API y web pública.
- Corregir bugs existentes y estabilizar flujos críticos.
- Revisar integraciones entre frontend y backend.
- Mejorar formularios, listados, permisos, autenticación, subida de archivos, generación de PDFs y módulos de gestión.
- Asegurar que los despliegues desde GitHub funcionen correctamente.
- Trabajar con ramas, pull requests, commits claros y pruebas antes de subir a producción.
- Documentar lo mínimo necesario para que el proyecto sea mantenible.
- Priorizar tareas con sentido práctico: primero lo que bloquea el lanzamiento.
Requisitos imprescindibles
- Experiencia sólida con Laravel en proyectos reales.
- Experiencia sólida con React y Next.js.
- Capacidad para trabajar sobre código existente sin romper funcionalidades.
- Conocimiento de Git, GitHub Actions y despliegues en servidor Linux por SSH.
- Experiencia con bases de datos MySQL, migraciones y depuración de errores.
- Seriedad, autonomía y disponibilidad real.
Muy valorable
- Experiencia en CRM, inmobiliarias, marketplaces, paneles de administración o SaaS.
- Experiencia con Laravel Sanctum, permisos/roles, PDFs, multiidioma, mapas, subida de imágenes y optimización de rendimiento.
- Experiencia trabajando con Plesk o servidores compartidos/VPS.
- Conocimientos de testing y mantenimiento de CI/CD.
Perfil que buscamos
Una persona senior o semi-senior muy resolutiva. Alguien que no solo programe, sino que piense en producto, detecte riesgos y ayude a cerrar el proyecto. Es importante que sea rápida, pero sin trabajar de forma desordenada. Preferimos calidad, comunicación clara y entregas pequeñas pero constantes.
jobs.tailored_advice: Dado que buscan a alguien que finalice un proyecto existente, destaca en tu CV tu capacidad para realizar 'refactoring' y mantenimiento de código legacy. Menciona explícitamente proyectos donde hayas gestionado el ciclo de vida completo (desde el despliegue con GitHub Actions hasta la resolución de bugs en producción). Si has trabajado con Laravel y Next.js en entornos SaaS o CRM, resáltalo en la parte superior, ya que es un requisito clave. En tu carta de presentación, enfatiza tu autonomía y tu enfoque en la entrega de valor, mencionando que eres capaz de auditar una arquitectura existente y proponer mejoras prácticas sin necesidad de supervisión constante.
jobs.cover_letter:
El desarrollo de plataformas robustas, donde la arquitectura backend en Laravel se integra de forma fluida con interfaces dinámicas en Next.js y React, es precisamente el entorno donde me siento más cómodo trabajando. He seguido con interés los retos técnicos que plantean para su plataforma y estoy convencido de que mi experiencia construyendo aplicaciones full-stack, desde la lógica de servidor hasta el despliegue en producción, encaja con la autonomía que buscan para finalizar este proyecto.

En mis proyectos personales, como mi plataforma de comercio electrónico con IA, he gestionado el ciclo de vida completo del software: desde el diseño de bases de datos en MySQL hasta la implementación de flujos de despliegue automatizados. Estoy habituado a trabajar con Git, GitHub Actions y la gestión de servidores Linux vía SSH, lo que me permite mantener un flujo de trabajo ordenado, realizar despliegues seguros y depurar errores de forma eficiente sin comprometer la estabilidad del sistema existente.

Entiendo perfectamente la necesidad de un enfoque práctico y orientado a producto para cerrar funcionalidades pendientes y estabilizar el CRM. Mi capacidad para analizar código ajeno, proponer soluciones técnicas y priorizar tareas críticas me permitirá integrarme rápidamente en su equipo y aportar valor desde el primer día. Me encantaría tener la oportunidad de conversar sobre cómo mi perfil técnico y mi capacidad de resolución pueden ayudarles a alcanzar los objetivos de lanzamiento de su plataforma.

jobs.title: Sales Assistant
jobs.description:
This role may require you to be on site at times - please check with the employer first.

 

 Job Title: Sales Assistant

 

 Company: Endureed

 

 Location: Lake City, FL / Remote eligible

 

 Reports to: VP of Global Sales

 

 

ABOUT THE ROLE

 

 

The Sales Assistant is the operational backbone of the US sales team. You'll provide hands-on administrative, coordination, and customer support to the VP of Global Sales — keeping the department running smoothly, accurately, and on time across residential and Strategic Partner (SP) channels.

 

 

 

This isn't a role for someone who wants to wing it, work independently without structure, or stay at arm's length from the details. It's a role for someone who finds real satisfaction in making sure nothing falls through the cracks someone who takes pride in accuracy, follows through without being asked twice, and genuinely enjoys being the person others can count on.

 

 

 

If you're the kind of person who gets energized by creating order, supporting a team, and doing the unglamorous-but-critical work that makes everything else possible keep reading.

 

 

 

✓  You'll thrive here if you...

 

•       Get genuine satisfaction from organizing, tracking, and keeping things accurate

 

•       Take ownership of tasks and follow through without being reminded

 

•       Prefer a defined role with clear expectations over open-ended autonomy

 

•       Are naturally calm, steady, and don't rattle easily when things get busy

 

•       Build trust by being dependable, not by being loud

 

•       Take pride in serving others and helping your team look good

 

•       Are bilingual in English and Spanish and comfortable using both professionally

 

•       Thrive in a structured, process-driven environment with consistent routines

 

✗  This role is NOT for you if you...

 

•       Need to be the center of attention or get credit to feel motivated

 

•       Prefer creating your own process over following an established one

 

•       Dislike repetitive tasks or detailed administrative work

 

•       Get bored or frustrated when you're not driving strategy or making big decisions

 

•       Struggle to stay organized when managing multiple people's priorities at once

 

•       Want flexibility to define your own schedule or work style without check-ins

 

•       Move fast and loose, accuracy and follow-through aren't your strong suits

 

•       Are looking for a stepping stone to a sales rep role as fast as possible

 

 

 

 

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 

Day-to-day, you will:

 

•       Provide administrative support to the VP of Global Sales, calendar management, scheduling, travel coordination, and communications

 

•       Prepare and update sales reports, presentations, and customer-facing materials for residential and SP accounts

 

•       Own CRM data entry, lead tracking, and pipeline management, data must be accurate and current at all times

 

•       Coordinate between the sales team and the SP network, including onboarding new partners and managing ongoing communication

 

•       Track SP territory coverage and ensure Basics product line distribution aligns with current SP network policies

 

•       Conduct market and competitor research to support US sales strategy

 

•       Help organize sales campaigns, trade shows, events, and client meetings, logistics, materials, follow-up

 

•       Ensure timely document and information flow between the sales team, operations, and other departments

 

•       Support order processing and client onboarding across residential and SP channels

 

 

WHAT YOU BRING

 

•       Bilingual — English and Spanish required, written and spoken (non-negotiable)

 

•       2+ years in a sales support, coordinator, or administrative role, you've done this before and you're good at it

 

•       CRM experience required; NetSuite or similar ERP a strong plus

 

•       Proficiency with Microsoft Office and/or Google Workspace, especially Excel/Sheets and PowerPoint/Slides

 

•       Exceptional organizational skills, you manage multiple moving pieces without losing track of any of them

 

•       High attention to detail, errors bother you before anyone else catches them

 

•       Calm, professional communication style, written and verbal

 

 

•       Experience in building materials, construction, or a product-based industry is a plus, not a requirement

 

 

To apply, please complete our Culture Index survey before submitting your application:

https://go.cultureindex.com/p/dmxXuQJk6Y4WKDaTvN

Applications without a completed survey will not be considered.

  1. Send an email to careers@endureed.com with the subject line: "Sales Assistant Application, First and Last Name" (replace with your name)
jobs.tailored_advice: Highlight your bilingual proficiency (English/Spanish) prominently at the top of your CV. Since the role emphasizes operational support and CRM accuracy, use bullet points to describe specific instances where you managed data, tracked leads, or improved administrative processes using tools like NetSuite or Excel. The company values structure and reliability over 'hustle' culture, so frame your experience around your ability to follow established protocols and maintain consistency. Ensure you complete the mandatory Culture Index survey linked in the job description, as they explicitly state applications without it will not be considered.
jobs.cover_letter:
My background in software development has provided me with a unique perspective on operational efficiency and data management. While I am a developer by trade, I have spent significant time building and maintaining complex systems, which has sharpened my ability to handle CRM data entry, pipeline tracking, and technical documentation with high precision. I am eager to apply this analytical mindset to support the VP of Global Sales at Endureed, ensuring that your sales operations remain accurate and streamlined.

I am particularly drawn to this role because of the emphasis on structure and detail. In my own projects, such as my e-commerce platform, I have managed end-to-end workflows, from database administration to automated communication flows. I am fully proficient in Google Workspace and Microsoft Office, and I am confident that my technical aptitude will allow me to master NetSuite or any other ERP system you utilize quickly. My C1 English proficiency and native Spanish skills will also allow me to bridge communication gaps effectively within your global sales channels.

I thrive in environments where consistency and reliability are the keys to success. I am ready to take ownership of the administrative tasks that keep your team moving forward, ensuring that no detail is overlooked. I have already completed the Culture Index survey and am prepared to discuss how my organizational skills can contribute to the continued success of the Endureed team. I look forward to the possibility of speaking with you soon.

jobs.title: Ingeniero Full-Stack Semi Senior

jobs.title: Senior Quality Engineer (Porto Alegre)
jobs.description:
This is a remote role for candidates located in Porto Alegre, Brazil

 

About LawnStarter

LawnStarter is the nation's leading on-demand marketplace for lawn care and outdoor services, with over $100M in annual bookings. We're expanding beyond lawn care to become the one-stop shop for all home services, operating across three brands (LawnStarter, Lawn Love, Home Gnome) on a single shared platform.

About Engineering at LawnStarter

We've spent the last two years rebuilding the platform from the ground up: new customer app, new Pro onboarding, job distribution engine, and data infrastructure. The foundation is solid. Now we're moving into expanded service verticals, dynamic pricing, and AI-powered features at scale. Quality needs to keep up.

Our stack is PHP (Laravel) and React/React Native, with Cypress as our primary test framework. We actively use Claude Code as part of our engineering workflow, not as an experiment, but as a core part of how we work.

 

The Role

As we scale into new service verticals and grow the engineering team, quality can't be reactive. This role exists to make quality proactive: owning the automation coverage, shaping the bug process, and partnering closely with Product, Design, and the Data team to catch problems before they reach customers.

You'll report to the Engineering Manager and be embedded across the engineering organization. This is hands-on and strategic, helping raise the quality ceiling for the whole team.

What makes this role different:

  • Cross-functional influence: You work directly with engineers, PMs, Designers, and the Data team to surface risks early, understand requirements deeply, and propose better solutions. You may be embedded in one or two delivery teams.
  • Automation ownership: You own the strategy for building and expanding our automated test coverage, not just executing test cases someone else wrote.
  • Process shaper: You'll identify gaps in our quality process and have the authority to fix them, not just flag them.

 

What You'll Own

  • Automated test coverage: Design and grow our E2E and integration test suite using Cypress. Set the strategy, prioritize coverage gaps, and raise the floor across the platform.
  • Bug process: Own the full lifecycle from triage to production fix. Keep it moving, keep stakeholders informed, and make sure nothing falls through the cracks.
  • Cross-functional quality partnership: Collaborate with PMs, Designers, and the Data team to review requirements, raise risks early, and define what "done" actually means.
  • Process improvement: Identify weaknesses in how we deliver software and propose solutions. Not just document them.
  • Exploratory testing: Test new features and existing flows on web and mobile across devices, catching what automation misses.

 

Problems to Solve

Keeping automation coverage sharp as the product evolves Our E2E coverage is solid. The challenge is staying ahead: bringing new ideas, exploring different types of coverage, and finding smarter ways to automate different aspects of the application as the product grows and new service verticals come online.

Exploring new tools and leveraging AI to improve quality operations AI is changing how we build software, and it's changing how we can test it too. There's real opportunity here to use AI tools to increase output quality, cut repetitive work, and discover coverage gaps we'd otherwise miss. We want someone who actively explores that space, not someone who waits to be told what to use.

 

What Success Looks Like (Year 1)

  • Automation coverage stays strong: New features ship with automated tests as a baseline, and coverage strategies evolve with the product.
  • Bug process runs smoothly: Triage to fix cycle is predictable and stakeholders know where things stand without having to ask.
  • Deep business knowledge: You understand how the marketplace works well enough to anticipate edge cases on your own.
  • Quality process improvement shipped: At least one meaningful improvement to how we deliver quality is in place and being used by the team.



Requirements

Who You Are

AI-native. You use AI tools like Claude Code to write, maintain, and extend test code, not as a novelty, but as a standard part of how you work. You're comfortable with browser MCPs, agent workflows, and building scripts that automate the boring parts of QA. This is unlikely to be a good fit if you're skeptical of AI in the engineering workflow.

Automation-first. Your default when you find a problem is to ask how to prevent it automatically. You build test infrastructure that outlasts any individual test case. This is unlikely to be a good fit if your strength is manual testing and automation is something you tolerate rather than drive.

Customer-obsessed. You think like a user. When you're testing a flow, you're asking whether it actually works for a real customer, not just whether it matches the spec. This is unlikely to be a good fit if you treat quality as a checkbox rather than a standard.

Adaptable. You don't get attached to a single tool, stack, or process. We're in a period of rapid evolution in how software gets built and tested, especially with AI, and you lean into that rather than resist it. This is unlikely to be a good fit if you thrive only in stable, well-defined tooling environments.

Collaborative and direct. You work across Product, Design, Engineering, and Operations. You surface risks early, speak plainly about what you find, and push back when something isn't ready to ship. This is unlikely to be a good fit if you prefer to work in isolation or soften feedback to avoid friction.

Technically solid. You're comfortable reading and writing code. You understand front and backend web services well enough to test them properly, write meaningful SQL queries, and debug issues across the stack. This is unlikely to be a good fit if your technical depth is limited to a single layer or framework.

 

This Role Is NOT

  • A manual-testing role: Most of your testing work should be building automation, not executing test scripts by hand.
  • A ticket-executor role: You're expected to shape what gets worked on and how, not just process a backlog.
  • A single-tool role: We use Cypress today, but we adapt. If you're only comfortable in one framework or one part of the stack, this will be limiting.
  • A role for someone who avoids ambiguity: The business is changing fast. New verticals, new flows, new edge cases. You need to be comfortable moving before everything is defined.
  • A back-of-the-line role: Quality is a first-class concern here. You're expected to have opinions and influence the process upstream, not just verify what's already been built.



Benefits

Compensation & Benefits

  • Base salary: $45-$65k
  • Equity: We want you invested in the quality and long-term health of the platform you're helping build.
  • Fully remote: Work from anywhere in the Americas. Deep focus and async collaboration are the norm here.
  • Unlimited PTO: We focus on results. Take what you need.

 

LawnStarter provides equal employment opportunities (EEO) to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, or genetics. We comply with applicable state and local laws governing nondiscrimination in employment.
jobs.tailored_advice: To stand out, emphasize your 'AI-native' mindset in your CV. Since they value 'Automation-first' engineers, highlight specific projects where you moved from manual testing to robust E2E Cypress frameworks. Include examples of how you have influenced product requirements or bug processes upstream, as they are looking for a strategic partner, not just a ticket executor. Finally, showcase your ability to debug across the full stack (PHP/Laravel and React) by mentioning specific instances where you used SQL to investigate production data issues.

jobs.title: Data Labeling Specialists
jobs.description:
Who We Are

Workada creates high-quality labeled data for advanced technology systems. Our team reviews, organizes, categorizes, evaluates, and quality-checks digital content so those systems can better understand information and perform real-world tasks.
We believe careful data work matters. Every reviewed item, categorized example, and quality-checked task helps improve how technology interprets information, follows instructions, and responds in practical settings.

About You

We're hiring detail-oriented individuals who are comfortable working on a computer and interested in careful, focused digital work. We're especially interested in:

  • People who can carefully review written information, images, documents, or other digital content
  • Strong readers and writers with good judgment
  • People who can follow detailed instructions consistently
  • Individuals who are comfortable using web-based tools and online platforms
  • People who take quality seriously and can spot mistakes or inconsistencies
  • Those who enjoy focused, independent work while contributing to a larger project
  • Strong character matters — we value integrity, reliability, curiosity, and a commitment to high-quality work



Qualifications

  • Comfortable using a computer for extended periods
  • Reliable internet connection
  • Strong attention to detail
  • Ability to follow written guidelines and project instructions
  • Clear written communication skills
  • Basic familiarity with spreadsheets, online forms, or web-based work tools
  • Ability to work independently and meet deadlines
  • Prior experience in data labeling, annotation, quality review, research, writing, customer support, operations, or administrative work is helpful but not required



Compensation

Compensation is $18- $22 an hour and a max of 40 hours a week.

A Place to Do Meaningful Work

Data labeling may sound simple, but it plays an important role in improving the technology people use every day. At Workada, your work helps create the examples and feedback that make advanced systems more accurate, consistent, and useful.

We're looking for people who care about accuracy, consistency, and careful judgment. Whether you're reviewing text, categorizing information, evaluating responses, or checking data quality, your work helps improve the way technology performs.
jobs.tailored_advice: Since this role focuses on data quality and following instructions, emphasize your attention to detail and ability to follow complex guidelines in your resume. Highlight any previous experience with spreadsheets, online forms, or administrative tasks, even if they were not strictly 'data labeling.' Use keywords like 'quality assurance,' 'data accuracy,' 'documentation,' and 'independent task management' to align with their requirements. Since they value reliability and integrity, include a brief summary or cover letter section that highlights your track record of meeting deadlines and maintaining high standards in repetitive or detail-oriented work.
jobs.cover_letter: My background as a software developer has been defined by a commitment to precision and the creation of reliable digital tools. Having built and deployed full-stack web applications, I am highly proficient in navigating complex online platforms and web-based environments. My experience managing administrative panels, automated email systems, and data-driven projects has sharpened my ability to handle digital content with the meticulous attention to detail that your data labeling projects require. I am accustomed to working independently to meet technical deadlines, ensuring that every line of code and every data point is accurate and functional. Beyond my technical skills, I possess a strong analytical mindset developed through my engineering studies and my work with AI integration. I understand that the quality of data is the foundation of any successful system, and I am eager to apply my focus and reliability to help Workada improve the accuracy of its technology. I am confident that my technical background and my ability to follow complex instructions will allow me to contribute effectively to your team from day one. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience with web tools and data management aligns with your current needs. Please let me know when you might be available for a brief conversation.

Como desarrollador apasionado por el ecosistema Angular, he dedicado gran parte de mi formación y proyectos personales a dominar herramientas modernas como Signals y el desarrollo modular con Nx, lo cual me permite construir aplicaciones escalables y eficientes. Mi perfil combina esta especialización en frontend con una base sólida en Java, lo que me permite abordar el desarrollo FullStack con una visión integral del ciclo de vida del software. Entiendo la importancia de la calidad en el código y la arquitectura, y estoy muy motivado por aplicar mis conocimientos en entornos profesionales que exigen excelencia técnica. Mi experiencia autodidacta, sumada a mi capacidad para trabajar en inglés fluido, me permite adaptarme rápidamente a equipos dinámicos y a los flujos de trabajo ágiles que requiere su equipo en Barcelona. Me encantaría tener la oportunidad de conversar sobre cómo mi enfoque en la resolución de problemas y mi compromiso con la innovación pueden sumar valor a los retos actuales de Zemsania. Quedo a su entera disposición para concertar una entrevista y profundizar en cómo mi perfil encaja con sus necesidades.

Enfocado en la creación de aplicaciones escalables mediante el uso de Signals, Nx y REST APIs. Perfil proactivo, con nivel de inglés C1 y experiencia demostrable en el despliegue de proyectos propios en producción.

jobs.title: Embedded Rust Engineer

Si no tienes experiencia directa con Rust, destaca tu dominio de C/C++ en sistemas embebidos y demuestra una curva de aprendizaje rápida mostrando contribuciones a crates de Rust o proyectos de código abierto. Asegúrate de mencionar conocimientos específicos de hardware (ARM, RISC-V, RTOS) para compensar la falta de experiencia específica en el lenguaje.
jobs.cover_letter: La intersección entre el software de alto rendimiento y el hardware es el área donde más disfruto aplicar mi capacidad de resolución de problemas. Aunque mi trayectoria se ha centrado en el desarrollo full-stack y la integración de IA, mi formación en Ingeniería Industrial me ha proporcionado una base sólida en sistemas físicos y lógica de control que deseo volcar ahora en el ecosistema de Rust para sistemas embebidos. Estoy convencido de que la seguridad y la eficiencia que ofrece Rust son el futuro de la programación de bajo nivel. He estado profundizando en cómo aplicar las garantías de memoria de Rust para optimizar el rendimiento en entornos con recursos limitados, un desafío que me motiva especialmente. Mi experiencia previa construyendo herramientas de escritorio y sistemas en producción me ha enseñado a escribir código robusto, mantenible y eficiente, competencias que estoy ansioso por trasladar a vuestros proyectos de firmware. Me entusiasma la posibilidad de aportar mi capacidad de aprendizaje rápido y mi enfoque analítico a vuestro equipo técnico. ¿Tendríais disponibilidad para una breve llamada la próxima semana y conversar sobre cómo mi perfil puede contribuir a los objetivos de desarrollo de vuestros sistemas embebidos?
jobs.cv_summary: Desarrollador de software con sólida base en Ingeniería Industrial y experiencia en el despliegue de aplicaciones complejas. jobs.title: Senior Independent AI Engineer / Architect
jobs.description:
Senior Independent AI Engineer / Architect

Remote | Americas, Europe, or Israel

 

Most AI engineers can find work.

 

Finding work worth doing is harder.

 

A.Team is an invite-only network of senior AI engineers, ML engineers, and AI architects building production AI systems for startups, enterprises, and global companies.

 

Since 2020, builders in the network have earned more than $200M working with companies including Lyft, Google X, HCA, Unilever, Sightful, D-ID, and others.

 

The Work

You'll join small teams solving real problems.

 

Not demos.

Not proof-of-concepts that never ship.

Not another thin wrapper around an API.


Recent work has included:

 

  •  AI-native products built from 0→1
  • Agent architectures and orchestration systems
  • Enterprise AI deployments
  • Retrieval, evaluation, and reliability infrastructure
  • LLM-powered workflows and products
  • Machine learning platforms operating at scale

 

You'll work directly with founders, CTOs, and product leaders, helping shape both technical direction and execution.

 

Why Builders Join

The best opportunities rarely make it to the open market.

 

A.Team exists to solve that.

 

No bidding.

 

No prospecting.

 

No race to the bottom.

 

Just ambitious companies, difficult problems, and experienced peers.

 

Who Thrives Here 

People who have already shipped.

 

Engineers who have deployed AI systems into production, understand the tradeoffs behind the hype, and know how to turn technical complexity into business value.

 

What matters is a track record of building and shipping.

 

The Details

 

  • Typical rates: $120-$170/hr
  • Remote
  • You keep 100% of your rate

 

Not a Fit

  • Early-career engineers
  • People without production AI experience
  • Small gig seekers
  • Developers focused primarily on simple AI wrappers or templated implementations

 

Apply

Tell us what you've built.

👉 build.a.team/apply-ai.

We'll take it from there.
jobs.tailored_advice: This role is specifically for Senior AI Architects and Engineers with extensive production experience. Your current profile is excellent for a junior/mid-level role, but to compete for this specific position, you must emphasize the 'reliability' and 'infrastructure' aspects of your AI projects. Highlight how you handled edge cases, latency, and data security in your AI integrations. Since you are early in your career, focus on your capacity for high-level architectural thinking rather than just coding tasks.
jobs.cover_letter: I have been following the work at A.Team and am impressed by the caliber of production-grade AI systems your network delivers. As a developer who thrives on building end-to-end solutions, I have spent the last year focusing on moving beyond simple API wrappers to create functional, AI-native products that solve real-world problems. My recent work includes developing 'El Grano de Oro,' a full-stack e-commerce platform where I integrated Gemini to provide personalized product recommendations and an intelligent virtual assistant, all deployed and currently live in production. I am deeply interested in the challenge of building robust agent architectures and reliable AI infrastructure. My technical background, combined with my ability to manage the full development lifecycle—from database design to frontend implementation—allows me to translate complex requirements into scalable business value. I am eager to bring my hands-on experience in deploying AI-integrated applications to the A.Team network and contribute to the ambitious projects you are building for global companies. Thank you for your time and consideration.

jobs.title: Staff Product Engineer (Montevideo)
jobs.description:
This is a remote role for candidates located in Montevideo, Uruguay.

 

About LawnStarter

LawnStarter is the nation's leading on-demand marketplace for lawn care and outdoor services, with over $100M in annual bookings. We're expanding beyond lawn care to become the one-stop shop for all home services — operating across three brands (LawnStarter, Lawn Love, Home Gnome) on a single shared platform.

About Engineering at LawnStarter

We build in small, focused initiative teams: a Product Engineer working alongside a PM and a designer, supported by an Engineering Manager who helps you grow. You'll also work shoulder-to-shoulder with engineering peers across initiatives in a shared codebase. The whole team owns whether the work moves its metric.

AI coding agents are a force multiplier here — they give a small, senior team the leverage to ship more, faster, and at a higher bar for quality. We hire engineers who are wired for ownership and energized by shipping to a real marketplace with customers and pros on both sides.

 

The Role

You're the engineering anchor of an initiative — working as part of a tight team with your PM and designer, and alongside engineering peers on adjacent initiatives. You have a hand in the full lifecycle: shaping the problem, deciding the technical approach, directing AI agents to implement much of the code, shipping to production, and — with your team — owning the outcome.

You're measured by impact, not by lines of code merged. When an agent can ship something safely, your job is to make sure it's done right and the metric moves. When the work calls for careful, hand-written code in a sensitive area, you write it yourself.

What makes this role exciting:

  • You ship end-to-end. From problem-framing through production to the post-launch metric review — you see the whole arc and own the result with your team.
  • You work as a true product partner. You sit at the table with PM and design, bringing engineering judgment to product calls and product sense to engineering calls.
  • You get real autonomy — with the right checkpoints. You make most technical calls yourself, with architect review on significant architectural decisions and fast input from peers.
  • You operate at a staff bar. You're trusted to make the call, ship the hard thing, and stand behind the outcome.

 

What You'll Own

 

  • The technical approach — architecture, data model, integration choices, rollout plan, observability, and rollback strategy for your initiative. You make most calls yourself and bring significant architectural decisions to architect review; you document them, and revisit if the data says you were wrong.
  • Implementation quality — the prompts, guardrails, evals, tests, and review loop that let agents ship safe, correct, production-ready code. Most lines will be agent-authored, and you're accountable for them — held to the same standard as the rest of the team working in a shared codebase.
  • Cross-functional partnership — daily working contact with your PM (scope, tradeoffs) and designer (UX decisions, in-tool prototyping), regular collaboration with engineering peers, and weekly check-ins with your EM.
  • The initiative outcome — the metric the initiative was set up to move. With your PM, you present results 2–4 weeks post-launch and share the "did it work" answer.
  • A high bar for what ships — production correctness, security, performance, observability, and the experience for customers and pros. Agents accelerate you; they don't lower the bar.

 

Problems to Solve

 

Leading AI agents at a staff-level quality bar Most of the code on your initiative will be authored by AI agents. The craft is making them ship as if a senior engineer wrote it: prompts that encode our conventions, evals that catch issues before merge, tests that exercise the edges, observability that catches a regression before a customer does. How do you build a workflow that lets a small team ship far more than its size would suggest?

Owning decisions with high autonomy You have real latitude to make and document technical calls quickly — with architect review on the big architectural ones and peers to pressure-test your thinking. How do you move fast, keep your team aligned, and stay accountable to the outcome?

Shipping outcomes, not features Each initiative is measured by a metric — a conversion rate, a retention curve, a pro-funnel KPI, a unit-economics shift. You're accountable for the number alongside your team. How do you scope to actually move it, decide what *not* to build, and have the discipline to follow up 2–4 weeks after launch?

 

What Success Looks Like (Year 1)

 

  • Initiative outcomes hit — You've shipped 3–4 initiatives end-to-end, and at least two clearly moved their metric (with the post-launch review to prove it).
  • Agent workflow that travels — The prompts, evals, and review loop you built are picked up by peers on other initiatives.
  • Faster cycle time — Median time from problem-framing to first production rollout on your initiatives is meaningfully shorter.
  • Quality holds — No customer- or pro-facing regression traceable to agent-authored code that slipped through your review.
  • Visible leverage — Peers point to artifacts you left behind — runbooks, evals, agent workflows, post-launch write-ups — as references they use.



Requirements

Who You Are

 

  • AI-native. Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, or equivalent are how you ship today — daily, on production work. You have real opinions about prompts, evals, agent loops, and review workflows, and you know when to let the agent run versus write it yourself.
  • Operating at a lead level. Whatever your current title, you've been the person making the call, shipping the hard thing, and standing behind whether it worked.
  • Outcome-driven. You measure your week in "did the metric move" and "did the experience get better." You read the post-launch dashboard and own the answer.
  • A strong horizontal partner. You hold your own with a strong PM and designer, and you collaborate well with engineering peers in a shared codebase. You bring engineering judgment to product calls and product judgment to engineering calls.
  • Decisive and documented. You make architecture, data-model, and rollout calls, write them down, get fast input, and move.
  • A force multiplier. Your impact compounds beyond your own initiative because you leave reusable artifacts behind — agent workflows, evals, runbooks, post-launch reviews.
  • Customer- and pro-minded. This is a real marketplace with real people on both sides, and you care about the outcomes for both.

 

Good to Know

 

  • An individual-contributor role with room to grow. People management sits with the EM — but the path into management is an open door for those who want it.
  • A product-engineering role, end-to-end. You ship features that move metrics; platform and architecture work happen inside the initiative when the outcome needs them.
  • Hands-on, with a high quality bar. Agents handle much of the implementation; you bring the judgment, design, safety, and accountability. The bar is high.
  • Shipping to a live marketplace. With $100M+ in bookings, customers and pros use what you ship within the same week.

 

Tech You'll Touch

 

  • AI agents — Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, internal agent stack, MCP servers, evals tooling
  • Backend — PHP/Laravel
  • Frontend — TypeScript/React/React Native (customer & pro apps, web and mobile)
  • Data — Redshift, dbt, Segment, Airflow
  • Infra — AWS, Datadog, Sentry, GitHub Actions
  • Documentation & process — Brain (Claude Code skills + docs repo), Confluence, Jira

You don't need every box checked. You need deep skill in at least one of our stacks plus credible production experience with AI coding agents.



Benefits

  • Competitive salary of USD $80,000–$100,000 annual base
  • Work from anywhere
  • High ownership and autonomy
  • Fast-moving team that loves to build, learn, and grow
jobs.tailored_advice: To stand out for this Staff Product Engineer role, your CV must pivot from 'coding' to 'AI-augmented product ownership.' Highlight specific instances where you used tools like Cursor or Claude Code to accelerate delivery while maintaining high quality. Don't just list technologies; describe the 'metrics' you moved in previous roles. Emphasize your experience in cross-functional teams (PM/Design) and your ability to document architectural decisions. Since they value 'force multipliers,' include a section or bullet points on how you've built reusable workflows, runbooks, or internal tools that improved team efficiency.
jobs.cover_letter: The opportunity to join LawnStarter as a Staff Product Engineer resonates with my approach to software development: building high-impact solutions while leveraging AI as a force multiplier. Having already integrated AI models like Gemini into production-ready applications, I understand that the true craft lies in creating robust workflows, evals, and guardrails that ensure agent-authored code meets the highest production standards. My experience building full-stack projects—from the database layer to the user interface—has taught me to prioritize outcomes over mere lines of code. Whether I am working with PHP and Laravel or crafting interfaces in React and TypeScript, I focus on how my technical decisions directly influence product metrics and user experience. I am particularly drawn to your initiative-based structure, where engineers act as product partners. I thrive in environments where autonomy is balanced with accountability, and I am eager to apply my skills in Claude Code and Cursor to help your team ship faster without compromising on quality. I am confident that my proactive mindset and hands-on experience with AI-driven development will allow me to contribute immediately to LawnStarter’s marketplace goals. I would welcome the chance to discuss how my background in building end-to-end applications aligns with your current engineering initiatives. Are you available for a brief conversation next week to explore this further?

FUNCIONES:

Recepción del sprint y gestión de la lista de tareas asignadas.
Definición técnica y diseño de la implementación de nuevos requerimientos.
Desarrollo de funcionalidades y mantenimiento evolutivo/correctivo.
Coordinación y apoyo a grupos de desarrollo.
Pruebas funcionales básicas y validación técnica.
Atención al cliente en turnos rotativos de soporte de nivel 3.
Instalación y configuración de software en las instalaciones del cliente (entorno hospitalario).
QUÉ OFRECE NUESTRO CLIENTE

Contrato Indefinido.
Retribución a negociar según experiencia y valía.
Jornada completa, de Lunes a Jueves de 08:30 a 17:30 h. Viernes de 08:00 a 14:00 h.
Jornada intensiva Julio y Agosto, de Lunes a Viernes de 08:00 a 15:00 h.
Incorporación a un sector estable, altamente especializado y con impacto directo en la mejora de la salud.

jobs.tailored_advice: Destaca tu experiencia en entornos críticos o de salud, ya que valoran la estabilidad y el impacto directo. Dado que el puesto incluye soporte de nivel 3 e instalaciones en cliente, enfatiza tus habilidades de comunicación, resolución de problemas bajo presión y capacidad para trabajar en entornos hospitalarios. Si tienes experiencia con despliegues o configuración de software en servidores, asegúrate de resaltarlo, ya que es una función clave del rol.
jobs.cover_letter: El sector de la salud requiere soluciones tecnológicas precisas y fiables, y es precisamente ese nivel de exigencia el que me motiva a presentar mi candidatura para unirme a su equipo de desarrollo en Granollers. Como desarrollador full-stack con experiencia en proyectos reales, entiendo que el software no solo debe ser funcional, sino también robusto y capaz de integrarse en entornos críticos. En mis proyectos, como la plataforma de comercio electrónico con integración de IA, he demostrado mi capacidad para gestionar el ciclo completo de vida del software, desde el diseño técnico hasta el despliegue y mantenimiento, habilidades que estoy deseando aplicar en sus sistemas hospitalarios. Mi perfil combina una sólida base técnica en JavaScript, Java y SQL con una gran capacidad de aprendizaje autónomo, lo que me permite adaptarme rápidamente a nuevas arquitecturas y colaborar eficazmente en equipos multidisciplinares. Además, mi experiencia en soporte y despliegue de aplicaciones me ha dotado de la resiliencia necesaria para afrontar los retos del soporte de nivel 3 y la atención directa al cliente. Estoy convencido de que mi proactividad y mi enfoque orientado a la resolución de problemas aportarán un valor inmediato a su equipo. Me encantaría tener la oportunidad de conversar sobre cómo mi experiencia técnica y mi compromiso con la excelencia pueden contribuir a los objetivos de su empresa. ¿Podríamos agendar una breve entrevista para profundizar en cómo encajo en sus necesidades actuales?

jobs.title: Online Data Analyst Canada (French Language) (C)
jobs.description:
Are you a detail-oriented individual with a passion for research and a good understanding of national and local geography? This freelance opportunity allows you to work at your own pace and from the comfort of your own home.


A Day in the Life of an Online Data Analyst:

  • In this role, you will be working on a project aimed at enhancing the content and quality of digital maps that are used by millions of people worldwide
  • Completing research and evaluation tasks in a web-based environment such as verifying and comparing data, and determining the relevance and accuracy of information.


Join us today and be part of a dynamic and innovative team that is making a difference in the world!


TELUS Digital AI Community

Our global AI Community is a vibrant network of 1 million+ contributors from diverse backgrounds who help our customers collect, enhance, train, translate, and localize content to build better AI models. Become part of our growing community and make an impact supporting the machine learning models of some of the world’s largest brands. 

Qualification path

No previous professional experience is required to apply to this role, however, working on this project will require you to pass the basic requirements and go through a standard assessment process. This is a part-time long-term project and your work will be subject to our standard quality assurance checks during the term of this agreement. 


Basic Requirements

  • Full Professional Proficiency in French language
  • Being a resident in Canada for the last 5 consecutive years and having familiarity with current and historical business, media, sport, news, social media, and cultural affairs in Canada.
  • Ability to follow guidelines and conduct online research using search engines, online maps, and website information
  • Flexibility to work across a diverse set of task types, including maps, news, audio tasks, and relevance
  • Daily access to a broadband internet connection, computer, and relevant software


Assessment

In order to be hired into the program, you’ll take an open book qualification exam that will determine your suitability for the position and complete ID verification. Our team will provide you with guidelines and learning materials before your qualification exam. You will be required to complete the exam in a specific timeframe but at your convenience.


Equal Opportunity

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for a contractual relationship without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or protected veteran status. At TELUS Digital AI, we are proud to offer equal opportunities and are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive community. All aspects of selection are based on applicants’ qualifications, merits, competence, and performance without regard to any characteristic related to diversity.
jobs.tailored_advice: Highlight your deep familiarity with Canadian culture, geography, and current events, as this is a core requirement. Emphasize your attention to detail and ability to follow strict guidelines, as the role involves quality assurance and data evaluation. Since this is a freelance, remote position, showcase your self-discipline and ability to work independently. Ensure your CV clearly states your residency in Canada for the last 5 years, as this is a mandatory compliance criterion.

My technical foundation, combined with my C1 English proficiency and ongoing French studies, allows me to navigate complex documentation and contribute effectively to global projects.
