Me encantaría tener la oportunidad de conversar sobre cómo mi enfoque en el desarrollo full-stack y mi pasión por la automatización pueden contribuir a los objetivos de su equipo de Python. ¿Tendrían disponibilidad para una breve entrevista la próxima semana?

jobs.title: Customer Operations & Writing Specialist
jobs.description:
Here at Clerky, we build software to make legal paperwork easier for startups and their attorneys. We're profitable and growing sustainably. We're the most popular way for high-growth technology startups to form, and are also used by many top-tier startups for hiring and fundraising.

 

As a Customer Operations & Writing Specialist at Clerky, you will be the voice of the company to thousands of startup founders, investors, and attorneys. These customers use Clerky to get critical legal paperwork done, often on a tight timeline. Our success is based on word-of-mouth, so we have a strong culture of providing world-class service (ask us about our satisfaction ratings!). We are rabidly customer-centric.

 

What Makes Customer Operations Different at Clerky

 

It’s a lot harder here. Helping our customers can be unusually challenging due to the nuanced and specialized nature of their questions. Doing the job well can require a lot of iterative feedback, so we're looking for someone who thinks critically about their writing and is always looking for ways to improve. Along the way, you'll also pick up a lot of knowledge about startups and startup law.

 

The challenges never stop. The level of learning and craftsmanship that goes into writing responses to our customers requires intense focus. If you’re looking for the kind of position where you can easily master all the information at the beginning and work in a way that does not require intense focus, this position will probably not be a good fit for you. On the other hand, if you love learning and constantly challenging yourself, this position could be a good fit for you.

 

There are often no right answers. We’re often not able to provide definitive answers to the questions we receive. In many cases, the best we can do is to equip our customers with the information they need to be able to figure out the right answer on their own, or to understand that it isn’t possible to figure out what the right answer is. If you prefer an environment more oriented around providing definitive answers, this position may not be a good fit for you.

Minimum Requirements

  • Genuine love for helping people

  • High emotional intelligence

  • Logical / analytical thinker

  • Exceptional written English communication skills, including the ability to write precisely and succinctly

  • Extremely detail-oriented

  • Comfort with working remotely and independently

  • Technologically savvy - you should be confident in your ability to use new software without training

  • Appreciation for giving and receiving feedback often (often several times a day)

  • Natural internal motivation to constantly strive for excellence in everything you do

How We Work

  • Clerky has been remote-first for many years, long before COVID. We’re very familiar with working remotely, and enjoy it.

  • Our team is small, so everyone's contributions matter. We work efficiently, autonomously, and with great respect for each other.

  • We work openly and collaboratively. We’re here to support you in being successful in this role. You'll work closely with other team members to ensure our customers are getting the best possible support and experience.

  • Everyone on our team works hard, and we trust team members to know what will help them be most productive. Schedules are flexible as long as there is adequate team coverage.

  • We want to help you grow, so we have a budget for books, courses, tools, or whatever other educational resources you need to be successful.

  • We offer top-of-market compensation and benefits and the opportunity to learn a lot while helping our customers through an exciting time in their lives.

Responsibilities

  • Writing thoughtful and empathetic replies to customer emails using our help desk software, Help Scout

  • Writing and maintaining help center articles, and identifying topics for new articles based on customer inquiries

  • Working with our engineering team to debug software issues our customers encounter

  • Using our software to develop and manage new ways for our customers to complete legal paperwork

  • Assisting product team by testing new features and bug fixes, and conveying customer feedback

  • Spotting trends in customer issues that other team members should be alerted to

This is a 100% remote position. You'll be able to work from home (or from anywhere else). We offer top-of-market compensation and benefits, reasonable hours, and reasonable customers. No legal experience or background is necessary or preferred.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.
jobs.tailored_advice: Since this role emphasizes 'exceptional written English' and 'critical thinking' over legal experience, your resume should highlight instances where you simplified complex technical concepts for non-technical users. Emphasize your experience with Help Scout or similar help desk platforms. In your cover letter, explicitly mention your comfort with receiving iterative feedback and your ability to navigate ambiguity, as the job description stresses that there are often no 'right' answers. Showcase your attention to detail by ensuring your application is error-free, as this is a core requirement for their writing-heavy workflow.
jobs.cover_letter: The challenge of translating complex technical concepts into clear, empathetic communication is exactly what drives my professional interest. Having developed full-stack applications and integrated AI models like Gemini into production environments, I have learned that the most sophisticated software is useless if the user cannot navigate it effectively. My experience building tools like 'El Grano de Oro'—which required managing automated email notifications and multi-language support—has prepared me to handle the nuanced customer inquiries Clerky receives with both precision and care. I am particularly drawn to your focus on iterative feedback and the craft of writing. As someone who thrives on continuous improvement and analytical problem-solving, I am eager to apply my technical background to help debug software issues and maintain your help center documentation. I am comfortable working independently in remote settings and am ready to dive into Help Scout to provide the world-class support your users expect. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my technical aptitude and commitment to excellence can contribute to the Clerky team. Are you available for a brief conversation next week to explore how I can support your customer operations?

jobs.title: Assistant Account Payable
jobs.description:
This role may require you to be on site at times - please check with the employer first.

 

The Accounts Payable Assistant performs accounting and clerical tasks that are related to accounts payable transactions including receiving and logging invoices, maintaining and updating an accounts payable ledger, generating financial statements and reports, and other financial matters as assigned by the Director of Finance & Operations. The ideal candidate will possess a basic understanding of accounting fundamentals as well as excellent office support skills.

Key Responsibilities of the Accounts Payable Assistant:

Administrative Duties
• Office Support - filing, data retention, mail, and other duties.
• Conduct company business according to policies.
• Maintain the company’s accounting files as needed
Accounts Payable Duties
• Process Invoices (Stamping coding and approval stamps, entering coded invoices into accounting software).
• Print, mail, and file checks for multiple properties.
• Resolutions with vendors – past due balances, misapplied payments, etc.

What the Successful Accounts Payable Assistant will have:
• High School Diploma or equivalent
• Basic understanding of accounting fundamentals or 1 year of accounting experience
• Excellent computer skills especially Microsoft Excel, Word, and Outlook
• Data entry and/or 10 key experience
• Experience with Yardi or other accounting software
• High degree of accuracy, attention to detail, and ability to follow through
• Professional written and oral communication skills
• Prompt and consistent attendance during scheduled work hours
• Ability to maintain confidential information
jobs.tailored_advice: Since your match score is low, emphasize any previous experience with Yardi or similar property management accounting software. Highlight your proficiency in Microsoft Excel, specifically data entry and reconciliation tasks. Since this is an entry-level role, focus your CV on your attention to detail, accuracy in administrative tasks, and your ability to handle confidential financial information. If you lack direct AP experience, showcase your organizational skills and any past roles involving vendor communication or invoice processing.
jobs.cover_letter:
My background in software development and engineering has instilled in me a rigorous approach to data accuracy and process automation. While my core experience lies in building full-stack applications, I have consistently applied my technical proficiency in Microsoft Excel, Word, and Outlook to manage complex project documentation and administrative workflows. I am eager to leverage these analytical skills to support your finance team as an Accounts Payable Assistant.

I understand that precision is paramount when handling invoice processing, ledger maintenance, and vendor resolutions. My experience developing custom software solutions—including automated email notification systems and database management—demonstrates my ability to handle financial data with the high degree of accuracy and confidentiality required for this role. I am highly adaptable and quick to master new platforms, ensuring I can become proficient in Yardi or any other accounting software you utilize in a very short timeframe.

I am confident that my technical mindset and commitment to operational efficiency will allow me to contribute effectively to your department's goals. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my attention to detail and office support skills can benefit your team. Are you available for a brief conversation next week to explore how I can support your current financial operations?

jobs.title: SAP Integration Suite Developer (Cpi) Inglés
jobs.tailored_advice: Dado que tu match es bajo, destaca proyectos específicos donde hayas implementado flujos de integración en SAP CPI o Cloud Integration. Certificaciones oficiales de SAP Integration Suite son altamente valoradas para compensar la falta de experiencia directa. Asegúrate de mencionar tu nivel de inglés, ya que es un requisito explícito en el título de la oferta.
jobs.cover_letter: La arquitectura de sistemas y la automatización de procesos son áreas que me apasionan profundamente, y es precisamente este interés el que me motiva a postularme para la posición de SAP Integration Suite Developer. Aunque mi trayectoria se ha centrado en el desarrollo full-stack y la integración de modelos de IA, poseo una base sólida en Java y una gran capacidad de aprendizaje autodidacta que me permitirá dominar el ecosistema de SAP CPI con rapidez y eficacia. Mi experiencia previa desarrollando aplicaciones en producción, como tiendas online con sistemas de recomendación y herramientas de gestión, me ha dotado de una mentalidad orientada a la resolución de problemas complejos y a la creación de flujos de datos robustos. Entiendo que la integración es el corazón de la eficiencia empresarial, y estoy muy entusiasmado por aplicar mi rigor técnico y mi dominio del inglés nivel C1 para contribuir a los proyectos de integración de su equipo. Me encantaría tener la oportunidad de conversar sobre cómo mi perfil técnico y mi proactividad pueden aportar valor inmediato a sus implementaciones en SAP Integration Suite. Quedo a su entera disposición para concertar una entrevista y profundizar en cómo puedo integrarme en su equipo de trabajo.

jobs.title: Desarrollador/a Full Stack Senior
jobs.description:
Desde InfoJobs Performance, estamos buscando Desarrollador/a Full Stack Senior para trabajar en Shakers, en Valencia.

Shakers es una startup española, cuenta con 105 personas en el equipo y se dedican a la conexión entre empresas y talento freelance altamente cualificado, creando equipos de trabajo flexibles para proyectos tecnológicos y digitales. Su visión es ser la comunidad y plataforma líder en el mundo que ayuda a las empresas a trabajar con equipos freelance a través de su tecnología.

Funciones:
- Desarrollo de Servicios y API: Diseñar, construir y mantener servicios backend escalables y fiables (ej. NestJS) y aplicaciones server-side con Node.js y Next.js.
- Microservicios y Sistemas Orientados a Eventos: Diseñar e implementar arquitecturas de microservicios y pipelines orientados a eventos (Kafka o similar), asegurando un bajo acoplamiento, alto rendimiento y resiliencia.
- Colaboración en Frontend: colaborar con diseñadores UI/UX para construir frontends responsivos, de alta calidad y "pixel-perfect" usando React, Vue o Angular, e integrarlos con las API RESTful y GraphQL.
- Rendimiento y Calidad: Optimizar los tiempos de carga, el tamaño de los paquetes (bundle sizes) y las interacciones del usuario.
- Agile y DevOps: Liderar la metodología “Shakers Agile”: gestionar los flujos de trabajo en GitLab, escribir tests, aplicar las mejores prácticas de CI/CD y automatizar donde tenga sentido (AWS EC2/S3/CloudFront/Lambda).
- Arquitectura y Calidad: Aplicar Arquitectura Hexagonal, Diseño Guiado por el Dominio (DDD), Código Limpio (Clean Code) y principios SOLID para asegurar una base de código mantenible.
- Seguridad y Cumplimiento: Implementar autenticación/autorización (JWT, OAuth), hacer cumplir la protección de datos e integrar herramientas de calidad/seguridad de código (SonarQube).




Se ofrece:
- Contrato: indefinido. 
- Jornada: completa.
- Horario: de L a V flexible en las franjas de 9h a 19h, cumpliendo con las 40h semanales. 
- Teletrabajo: híbrido, 2 días mínimo en oficina y 3 en casa.
- Otros beneficios sociales: retribución flexible.
- Ser parte de una startup en rápido crecimiento y expansión internacional.
- Tener un ambicioso plan de desarrollo profesional para ayudarte a alcanzar tu máximo potencial.
- Disfrutar de una cultura de equipo inmejorable, ¡pregunta a cualquiera de nuestro equipo!
- En la oficina, cafeína y teína gratis.
- Salario: Entre 35.000€ y 45.000€ brutos anuales + bono del 15%, basado en el rendimiento, potencial y resultados globales de Shakers.
jobs.tailored_advice: Dado que la oferta enfatiza Arquitectura Hexagonal, DDD y principios SOLID, destaca en tu CV proyectos donde hayas refactorizado código legacy o diseñado sistemas complejos desde cero usando estas metodologías. Como buscan un perfil senior para una startup, resalta tu experiencia liderando flujos en GitLab y tu capacidad para implementar pipelines de CI/CD. Si tienes experiencia con Kafka, detalla cómo gestionaste la resiliencia y el manejo de eventos, ya que es un requisito técnico clave. Finalmente, menciona tu capacidad para trabajar en entornos híbridos y tu adaptabilidad a diferentes frameworks frontend (React/Vue/Angular), mostrando versatilidad técnica.
jobs.cover_letter: La propuesta de Shakers me resulta especialmente atractiva por su enfoque en la creación de equipos tecnológicos de alto rendimiento y su apuesta por la escalabilidad. Como desarrollador apasionado por la arquitectura de software, sigo de cerca cómo las plataformas modernas resuelven la conexión entre talento y empresa, y me entusiasma la posibilidad de aportar mi capacidad técnica a este ecosistema en crecimiento. Mi perfil combina una sólida base en desarrollo full-stack con una mentalidad orientada a la resolución de problemas complejos, algo que he demostrado en proyectos propios como mi plataforma de comercio electrónico con IA integrada, donde gestioné desde la lógica de backend hasta la experiencia de usuario final. Aunque mi trayectoria es joven, mi capacidad de aprendizaje autodidacta me ha permitido dominar el ciclo de vida completo de una aplicación, integrando servicios, bases de datos y despliegues en producción. Estoy muy motivado por profundizar en arquitecturas de microservicios, sistemas orientados a eventos y el uso de tecnologías como NestJS y Node.js, que son pilares fundamentales en vuestro stack. Me considero una persona proactiva, capaz de trabajar en entornos internacionales gracias a mi nivel C1 de inglés y con una gran disposición para adoptar metodologías ágiles y estándares de calidad como SOLID o DDD. Me encantaría tener la oportunidad de conversar sobre cómo mi energía y mis habilidades técnicas pueden contribuir al éxito de Shakers. ¿Podríamos agendar una breve llamada para profundizar en cómo encajo en vuestro equipo?

jobs.title: Remote Office Assistant
jobs.description:
Coalition Technologies is seeking a reliable, detail-oriented, and highly organized Remote Office Assistant to support administrative, bookkeeping, billing, reporting, data entry, and internal operations tasks. This role is ideal for someone with strong communication skills, discretion, attention to detail, and a willingness to learn and grow within a fast-paced remote work environment.

As an Office Assistant, you will help support daily administrative operations, assist with entry-level bookkeeping, organize client documents, support internal reporting, and help maintain accurate company records. This position offers strong growth potential for the right candidate, including opportunities for advancement within the Accounting team or other departments.

We are looking for talented and diligent candidates who perform well on our skills assessments. Strong skills test performance may be considered even if a candidate does not meet every preferred experience or educational background requirement.

 

Why Join Coalition Technologies?

Coalition Technologies is committed to delivering high-quality work for our clients while providing our team with a fun, thriving, innovative, and growth-focused work environment. We offer:

  • 100% remote work with a company that has supported remote team members for more than a decade
  • Competitive profit-sharing bonus plan, with up to 50% of company profits paid to full-time employees each month
  • Competitive Paid Time Off plan that supports work-life balance
  • Subsidized gym memberships
  • Medical, dental, vision, and life insurance packages for eligible US-based team members
  • International Health Insurance Reimbursement Program for eligible international team members
  • Device upgrade and learning reimbursement programs
  • Career development plans with clearly defined goals and rewards
  • Additional job-specific incentives and bonuses

 

Office Assistant Responsibilities

As an Office Assistant, your duties will include:

  • Answering phones and emails
  • Completing entry-level bookkeeping tasks, including recording expenses, organizing receipts, and maintaining transaction records
  • Resolving billing issues with clients and internal team members
  • Providing account access, usage reports, data analysis, and other ad hoc support for team members
  • Supporting quality assurance checks for internal and client-facing reports
  • Organizing new client contracts, creating invoices, and processing client payments
  • Contributing to internal database maintenance, upkeep, and data entry
  • Researching, ordering, and distributing company-wide gifts two to three times per year
  • Organizing company events, competitions, and special projects throughout the year
  • Facilitating company holiday calendars, time-off calendars, and schedule variation calendars

 

Required Skills and Qualifications

The ideal candidate will have:

  • Willingness to learn, grow, and collaborate with the team and company as a whole
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills
  • High level of discretion, ethics, and trustworthiness
  • Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
  • Ability to support administrative, bookkeeping, billing, reporting, and data entry tasks
  • Innovative thinking and willingness to challenge existing methods when improvement is possible
  • Availability to work 40 hours per week, Monday through Friday, 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. Pacific Time
  • Reliable remote workspace with a fast computer, quality internet, camera, microphone, and speakers

 

Preferred Skills

  • The following experience is preferred but not required:
  • Intermediate spreadsheet skills
  • Experience with bookkeeping or financial record keeping
  • Experience with Google Sheets, Microsoft Excel, QuickBooks Online, and Google Workspace
  • Experience supporting billing, invoicing, reporting, data entry, or administrative operations

 

Remote Work Environment

Coalition Technologies is a fully remote company. Our team works remotely with the support of time tracking software, structured communication, and a company culture designed to help remote team members succeed. We have supported remote team members for more than a decade and welcome qualified applicants from around the world.

 

Growth Opportunity

This position offers a strong opportunity for growth. Successful Office Assistants at Coalition Technologies have advanced quickly and earned promotions within the Accounting team and across other departments.

 

Compensation

For candidates located in California, New York, Washington, and Colorado, the starting base pay for this position ranges from $15 to $25 per hour. Compensation may vary based on factors such as experience, qualifications, skills test performance, geographic location, and seniority of the position offered. For candidates outside of California, New York, Washington, and Colorado, compensation may fall outside the listed range.
jobs.tailored_advice: Your current CV is heavily focused on software development, which is not the primary requirement for this administrative role. To increase your chances, emphasize your 'data entry', 'database management', and 'process organization' skills rather than coding languages. Highlight your experience with Google Workspace and any financial/billing logic you implemented in your projects. Since this is an administrative role, remove the focus on 'software engineering' and replace it with 'administrative support' and 'operational efficiency'.
jobs.cover_letter: I am writing to express my strong interest in the Remote Office Assistant position at Coalition Technologies. As a software development student with a background in industrial engineering, I have cultivated a rigorous approach to data management, process automation, and technical problem-solving that I am eager to apply to your administrative operations. My experience building and maintaining full-stack applications, such as my AI-integrated e-commerce platform, has required me to manage complex databases, handle billing logic, and ensure high-quality user experiences. I am highly proficient in English and comfortable working in fast-paced, remote environments. I am particularly drawn to your company’s culture of innovation and growth. My technical background allows me to quickly master new software tools, and I am confident that my attention to detail—honed through developing and deploying real-world applications—will allow me to contribute effectively to your bookkeeping, reporting, and data entry tasks. I am excited about the possibility of growing within your team and supporting your internal operations with efficiency and precision.

jobs.title: Software Engineer (Python & Cloud AWS). Teletrabajo 100%
jobs.description:
En Second Window continuamos expandiendo nuestro equipo técnico. Buscamos incorporar a un/a Software Engineer / Desarrollador/a Python & Cloud con más de 2 años de experiencia para sumarse a un proyecto de alta disponibilidad y transformación tecnológica.
 Tu Rol y Responsabilidades
Como Software Engineer / Backend Developer, te encargarás de:
Diseño y Desarrollo: Crear soluciones de software de alta disponibilidad, optimizando y asegurando la eficiencia en los procesos de desarrollo.
Calidad y Mejores Prácticas: Definir e implementar mejores prácticas de desarrollo, controles de calidad, pruebas automatizadas (pruebas unitarias) y estrategias de despliegue.
Observabilidad: Implementar alertas y métricas en tiempo real para medir y optimizar el rendimiento de las aplicaciones.
Entornos Cambiantes: Trabajar en marcos de trabajo ágiles y no ágiles, facilitando talleres y colaborando en la transformación del modelo actual (AS-IS) hacia el objetivo (TO-BE).
Entrega de Valor: Impulsar el rendimiento del equipo garantizando entregas sostenibles, iterativas y orientadas al cliente.
¿ Requisitos Técnicos y Competencias
Buscamos un perfil de Ingeniero/a de Software / Python Specialist que cumpla con los siguientes requisitos:
 Requisitos Obligatorios:
Formación: Título universitario en Ingeniería Informática.
Experiencia: +2 años de experiencia profesional como Software Engineer / Backend Developer.
Python: Nivel avanzado (Obligatorio).
AWS (Amazon Web Services): Nivel intermedio (Obligatorio).
Idiomas: Inglés nivel B2 (capacidad de comunicación fluida).
 Stack Técnico Deseable y Herramientas:
Sistemas y Contenedores: Linux, Docker, Kubernetes.
Infraestructura como Código (IaC): Terraform.
Ecosistema DevOps & Gestión: Jira, Jenkins, Git, Confluence.
Bases de Datos: Redis, ElasticSearch.
Lenguajes adicionales: Conocimientos intermedios de C / C++ (Opcional/Valorable).
¿ Valorables:
Manejo de plataformas de monitorización (Grafana).
Plataformas de planificación y automatización de procesos.
Alta capacidad de adaptación, versatilidad para trabajar con múltiples tecnologías y pasión por seguir aprendiendo.
 ¿Qué te ofrecemos en Second Window?
Estabilidad Real: Contrato indefinido desde el primer día para que construyas tu futuro con nosotros.
Modalidad de Trabajo: 100% Teletrabajo / Remoto.
Salario Competitivo: Banda salarial entre 30.000€ y 35.000€ brutos anuales 
Bienestar Integral: Seguro médico privado y seguro de vida cubiertos al 100% por la empresa.
Optimización Salarial: Acceso a nuestra plataforma de Retribución Flexible para maximizar tu sueldo neto (Tickets Restaurante, Guardería y Tarjeta Transporte).
Tu Tiempo es Sagrado: 23 días de vacaciones anuales + el día de tu cumpleaños totalmente libre para que lo celebres como quieras.
Crecimiento a tu Medida: Plan de carrera personalizado y acceso continuo a formación técnica para que nunca dejes de aprender.
 ¿Te entusiasma el reto?
Si encajas con alguno de estos perfiles (Software Engineer, Python Developer, Backend Developer, Cloud Engineer) y buscas un entorno remoto y retador, ¡queremos conocerte!
Inscríbete en la oferta o envíanos tu CV actualizado. ¡Te esperamos en el equipo!
jobs.tailored_advice: Dado que tu match es bajo, destaca en tu CV proyectos donde hayas implementado pipelines de CI/CD con Jenkins y despliegues en AWS usando Docker o Kubernetes. Si no tienes experiencia directa con Terraform, resalta tu capacidad de aprendizaje rápido en herramientas de IaC. Asegúrate de incluir ejemplos concretos de cómo has aplicado pruebas unitarias en Python para garantizar la calidad del código, ya que es un requisito explícito. Finalmente, enfatiza tu nivel de inglés B2, ya que es un filtro obligatorio para la comunicación en este equipo remoto.
jobs.cover_letter:
La propuesta de Second Window para integrar soluciones de alta disponibilidad en entornos cloud resuena directamente con mi enfoque técnico. Como desarrollador apasionado por la automatización y la creación de software robusto, he seguido de cerca cómo la infraestructura moderna, apoyada en herramientas como Docker, Kubernetes y Terraform, transforma la eficiencia de los equipos de ingeniería. Mi perfil combina una sólida base en desarrollo con una mentalidad orientada a la resolución de problemas complejos, algo que he aplicado en mis proyectos personales desplegados en producción.

Aunque mi trayectoria académica en Ingeniería Industrial y el CFGS en Desarrollo de Aplicaciones Multiplataforma me ha dotado de una base técnica versátil, es en la práctica donde he consolidado mi dominio de lenguajes y herramientas. Estoy muy motivado por aplicar mis conocimientos en Python y mi experiencia gestionando despliegues en entornos Linux para contribuir a los objetivos de transformación tecnológica de su equipo. Además, mi nivel C1 de inglés me permite integrarme sin fricciones en entornos internacionales y colaborar activamente en la documentación y mejora de procesos.

Me entusiasma la posibilidad de aportar mi capacidad de aprendizaje rápido y mi proactividad a un entorno 100% remoto. Estoy convencido de que mi experiencia con el ciclo de vida completo del software y mi interés por la observabilidad y la calidad del código encajan con los retos que plantean. ¿Podríamos agendar una breve llamada para conversar sobre cómo mi perfil técnico puede sumar valor a los proyectos actuales de Second Window?
jobs.cv_summary: Desarrollador de software con sólida base técnica en Python y entornos Linux, enfocado en la creación de aplicaciones escalables y automatización. Experiencia práctica en despliegue de proyectos en producción, integración de IA y uso de herramientas de contenedorización como Docker. Perfil proactivo, con nivel de inglés C1 y gran capacidad de adaptación a entornos cloud y metodologías ágiles.

jobs.title: Communications Manager
jobs.description:
About Lemon.io
Lemon.io is building the autopilot for hiring. 
We've replaced the slow, expensive recruiting agency with a platform that delivers vetted, responsive candidates, ready for a final interview. In days, not weeks. 
Hundreds of fast-growing companies use Lemon to build their engineering teams, from early-stage startups to enterprises. We're profitable, bootstrapped, and growing at a moment when the legacy recruiting industry is being rewritten in real time.

Here's why this role exists. We have a great story and almost no one telling it. A profitable company helping rewrite a huge industry with AI, and a voice that is still a blank canvas. You'd be the one who decides how Lemon sounds and makes the market pay attention, working directly with the founder, with the freedom that comes from being bootstrapped.

About the position
The Communications Manager will own Lemon's external voice and its distribution.
The goal: make Lemon impossible to ignore in the engineering-hiring conversation. Every day, something from Lemon should be visible where our buyers and candidates already are, until the market treats us as the category leader.
This is a senior IC role, reporting directly to the founder. You'll personally do most of the writing and build systems for distribution.
This is an intensive role. You'll be producing daily and running a content distribution engine that doesn't stop. And while we'd typically expect 4+ years of experience, we're genuinely open to less experienced candidates who can demonstrate exceptional writing and judgment.

Responsibilities:
1. Executive Communications
- Lead the creation and execution of founders' personal brand platforms
- Produce and distribute day-to-day content across founders' channels
- Support founders' earned media: podcasts, panels, op-eds, and speaking opportunities
2. Internal News Scouting and Narrative Development
- Sit in product, customer success, sales, and ops syncs to identify newsworthy stories
- Identify and shape company moments worth telling publicly
- Translate internal milestones, launches, learnings, and customer wins into external content
- Distribute content via social and traditional media.
3. Team Engagement
- Build and support an internal content program that engages employees across functions
- Equip team members to share their work publicly through ready-to-use content and templates
- Coordinate the team's participation in industry conversations across channels
4. Monitoring, Automation
- Build and maintain content and distribution workflows using AI tools
- Set up monitoring for brand mentions, press coverage, and audience growth across channels
- Track, grow and report on key communications metrics quarterly

What we're looking for:
- Native or fluent English with cultural fluency for the US tech audience
- A genuinely strong writer. 
- You've been the voice behind someone else's posts. 
- Track record telling the story of a company, a product, or a movement
- Background in technology, B2B software, talent, recruiting, dev tools, or adjacent industries.
- You’re deeply immersed in the world of independent media: Substackers, podcasters, influencers on X or LinkedIn. 
- AI is already part of how you work.
- Comfortable operating in areas of genuine uncertainty.
- Results-oriented, with a bias toward action and impact.
- Want to be part of a small, fast-paced, and impactful team.

What success looks like in the first 4 weeks:
- You've built systems to capture content from our team and product, and to manufacture news.
- You've launched an amplification program by the team and outside voices, so every message travels.
- A repurposing workflow exists: one idea becomes a post, a thread, a clip, a newsletter line, without starting over each time.
- You've identified the 3 to 5 narratives that everyone will repeat.
- You've identified a few internal voices and enabled them to post regularly, with systems that feed them content ideas.
- By week 4, the founder's social posts go out 4 to 5 times a week.
- Baseline metrics captured, so growth is measurable from a known starting point.
Application Process

To apply, send us:
- Three writing samples that show range. At least one should be in a voice that isn't yours: something you ghost-wrote for an executive, a founder, or another public-facing operator.  
- A short note (200 words or fewer) telling us why this role and what you'd want to ship in your first 90 days. The point isn't to summarize your resume. It's to give us a sense of how you think and what you'd actually do.

What to expect:
- Application review within 7 days
- 45-minute call with the hiring team
- Paid trial project (up to 10 hours)
- Final 60-minute conversation with the founder
- Reference checks and offer

We aim to move from application to offer within 3-4 weeks.
jobs.tailored_advice: To stand out for this role, your CV must highlight your experience in ghostwriting for executives or founders, as this is a core requirement. Emphasize your ability to build content distribution systems rather than just creating content. Since they specifically mention AI tools, list the specific AI workflows (e.g., LLMs for content repurposing, automation tools) you use to scale output. In your application note, focus on a '90-day plan' that demonstrates a deep understanding of the B2B tech/recruiting landscape and how you would specifically amplify the founder's voice on platforms like X and LinkedIn.
jobs.cover_letter:
Lemon.io is rewriting the rules of engineering recruitment, and I want to be the one to tell that story. As a developer who builds products from the ground up—like my AI-powered e-commerce platform—I understand the technical challenges your clients face and the value of the talent you provide. I don't just write; I build systems. My experience integrating LLMs like Gemini into production environments means I can bridge the gap between complex technical milestones and compelling, human-centric narratives that resonate with a tech-savvy audience.

In my own projects, I have already mastered the art of content distribution and automation. I am comfortable operating in the fast-paced, bootstrapped environment you describe, where agility and high-quality output are the primary drivers of growth. I am ready to turn Lemon.io into an unignorable voice in the industry by translating internal product wins into a consistent, high-impact content engine.

In my first 90 days, I plan to implement a robust repurposing workflow that transforms single technical insights into multi-channel assets, ensuring the founder’s voice is amplified daily across X and LinkedIn. I am eager to discuss how my blend of technical expertise and communication skills can help scale your brand. Are you available for a brief call next week to explore how I can start shipping these results for you?

Location: Remote (Global)

 

About Funding Solutions Experts (FSE)

At FSE, we deliver elite capital solutions to high-growth businesses. We operate in a fast-paced, high-stakes environment where excellence is the standard, not the exception. We do not offer a "comfortable" corporate safety net; instead, we provide a launchpad for the top 1% of sales professionals who want absolute control over their financial destiny through a pure meritocracy.

If you are a self-motivated Closer who thrives in a high-volume, performance-driven environment, this is your opportunity to build an empire.

 
The Mission: Execute. Close. Lead.

 

  • High-Volume B2B Engagement: Conduct focused outbound campaigns (Monday – Friday) targeting business owners and C-suite executives.

  • Pipeline Management: Manage high-ticket financial sales cycles from initial contact to close, maintaining an authoritative and consultative approach.

  • Accelerated Leadership Path: We are scouting future Team Leaders. Once you consistently hit your benchmarks, you will be given the autonomy to recruit, train, and scale your own regional "Pod." You will earn direct overrides on every transaction your team closes.

  •  

Candidate Profile: The Top 1%

 

  • Commanding Communication: Your professional business English is flawless, authoritative, and persuasive. You don't just pitch; you influence key decision-makers.

  • Relentless Execution: You possess an elite work ethic, show up with high energy every single day, and view "No" as a brief detour on the path to a contract.

  • Performance Mindset: You excel in high-volume outbound dialing environments. You view critical feedback as revenue-generating data and adapt instantly.

  • Track Record: Proven experience in high-ticket closing, B2B sales, or financial services is highly preferred.

  •  

What FSE Offers

 

  • Uncapped Commission Structure: There is no ceiling on your income. Your revenue generation directly dictates your lifestyle.

  • Rapid Career Progression: We promote strictly on results, not seniority. Transition into a leadership role with team overrides within months of proven success.

  • Global Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere in the world, provided you have a high-speed internet connection, a quiet workspace, and an elite daily output.

  • High-Performance Culture: A zero-drama environment focused exclusively on execution, scale, and financial growth.

  •  

Are You Ready to Dominate the Market?

 

If you have the resilience, the drive, and the skill set to close high-ticket financial deals, we want to hear from you.

 

Apply today to join an elite team of financial sales professionals.
jobs.tailored_advice: Since this is a 100% commission-based role, your CV must shift from a list of duties to a 'proof of revenue' document. Highlight specific dollar amounts you have closed, your conversion rates in high-ticket B2B environments, and any instances where you built or scaled a sales pipeline from scratch. Use action verbs like 'negotiated,' 'closed,' 'outperformed,' and 'scaled.' Since they are looking for future leaders, explicitly mention any experience you have in mentoring junior reps or managing sales metrics. Ensure your tone is confident and results-oriented, as they are specifically screening for a 'top 1%' mindset.
jobs.cover_letter:
Building software products from scratch has taught me that success is not about comfort, but about relentless execution and solving complex problems. While my background is in software development, my approach to projects like 'El Grano de Oro'—where I integrated AI to drive user engagement and sales—mirrors the high-stakes, performance-driven mindset required at Funding Solutions Experts. I thrive in environments where results are the only currency, and I am eager to apply my technical discipline and C1-level communication skills to your high-ticket sales cycle.

I am not looking for a safety net; I am looking for a meritocracy where my ability to influence decision-makers and manage complex pipelines can be scaled. My experience in deploying production-ready tools has sharpened my ability to adapt quickly to feedback and iterate for maximum impact. I am ready to bring that same intensity to your outbound campaigns, treating every interaction as a data point to optimize revenue.

I am prepared to transition my technical problem-solving skills into a high-volume sales environment and work toward the leadership track you have outlined. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my drive and ability to scale projects can contribute to the growth of your team. Are you available for a brief conversation this week to discuss how I can start delivering results for FSE?

jobs.title: Arquitecte Tècnic o Enginyer/a o similars (Construcció innovadora)
jobs.description:
Per a empresa d'Osona, referent en el sector de la Construcció moderna i amb gairebé 100 anys d'història, en important fase de creixement i expansió, seleccionem un/a Arquitecte Tècnic o Enginyer de l'Edificació (o formació universitària similar) o FPII/CFGS d'Edificació i obra civil, per a formar part de l'Oficina Tècnica, integrada per 10-12 persones. Es tracta d'una excel·lent oportunitat professional per a un/a professional jove amb elevada motivació per a formar-se i créixer en una històrica empresa, referent d'un sector molt dinàmic i en creixement exponencial.

En dependència del Responsable de l'Oficina Tècnica, les principals tasques i responsabilitats del lloc de treball són:Disseny d'estructures segons ofertes prèviament acceptades pel client, mitjançant modelat amb el corresponent software.
Elaboració de plànols i fitxes de producció.
Elaboració de detalls tècnics amb AutoCAD.
S'ofereix:Incorporació immediata i estable (contracte indefinit) a jornada completa en empresa sòlida, referent en el seu sector, en constant creixement i de reconegut prestigi i reputació.
Horari: De dilluns a dijous: entrada de 8h a 9h, pausa de 30min. per dinar i sortida a partir de les 16:30h. Divendres: de 8h a 15h.
Estabilitat professional, interessants opcions de projecció professional i ambient de treball col·laboratiu en empresa amb escassa rotació laboral.
Participació directa en interessants projectes arquitectònics a través d'innovadors sistemes de construcció.
Assegurança mèdica privada.
Es requereix:Capacitat d'aprenentatge i motivació per a desenvolupar-se professionalment.
Capacitat analítica i d'atenció al detall.
Habilitats comunicatives.
Capacitat per a treballar en equip.
Coneixements o experiència en l'ús d'AutoCAD.
Coneixements o experiència en la interpretació de plànols.
jobs.tailored_advice: Dado que tu match es bajo, destaca en tu CV cualquier proyecto académico o profesional donde hayas utilizado AutoCAD para el diseño de estructuras o detalles constructivos. Si no tienes experiencia directa, enfatiza tu capacidad de aprendizaje y tu formación técnica en edificación. Asegúrate de mencionar tu habilidad para interpretar planos, ya que es un requisito clave. Dado que buscan un perfil joven con motivación, resalta tu interés por la construcción innovadora y tu capacidad para trabajar en equipos multidisciplinares.
jobs.cover_letter:
La combinación de mi formación en Ingeniería Industrial y mi experiencia práctica en el desarrollo de software me permite abordar los retos técnicos con una visión analítica y orientada a la eficiencia. He seguido de cerca la trayectoria de su empresa y me entusiasma la posibilidad de aportar mi capacidad técnica al equipo de la Oficina Técnica, especialmente en tareas de modelado y diseño de estructuras.

Aunque mi perfil se ha centrado en el desarrollo de aplicaciones, mi base en ingeniería me ha familiarizado con el entorno técnico y la precisión necesaria en la elaboración de detalles y planos. Cuento con experiencia en el uso de herramientas de diseño y modelado, y poseo la capacidad de aprendizaje rápido necesaria para dominar AutoCAD y los flujos de trabajo específicos de su sector. Mi enfoque es siempre la resolución de problemas y la optimización de procesos, habilidades que considero fundamentales para el diseño de estructuras innovadoras.

Me motiva enormemente la oportunidad de crecer profesionalmente en una empresa con una trayectoria tan sólida y un enfoque en la construcción moderna. Estoy convencido de que mi proactividad y mi capacidad para trabajar en entornos técnicos complejos serán un activo valioso para su equipo. Agradecería mucho la oportunidad de conversar en una entrevista sobre cómo mi perfil puede contribuir a los proyectos actuales de su Oficina Técnica.
jobs.cv_summary: Estudiante de Ingeniería Industrial y Desarrollo de Aplicaciones con gran capacidad analítica y técnica. Enfocado en el diseño, modelado y resolución de problemas complejos, con experiencia en herramientas de software y alta motivación para integrarme en el sector de la construcción innovadora.

jobs.title: Lean Manufacturing Engineer
jobs.description:
En BETWEEN te ofrecemos las oportunidades que necesitas para alcanzar tus objetivos profesionales. Si quieres desarrollar tus capacidades en IT e Ingeniería ¡este es tu próximo destino! Damos soporte en una gran variedad de áreas como Firmware, Software, BI, Diseño, Project Management y muchas más. Además, desarrollamos soluciones tecnológicas a medida desde nuestros BETWEEN Labs.
Estamos buscando un Lean Manufacturing Engineer para ampliar uno de nuestros equipos en Manresa. Dependiendo de la Dirección de Operaciones, el/la Senior Lean Manufacturing Engineer será responsable de liderar iniciativas de mejora Lean e impulsar el cambio cultural en relación con la filosofía Lean en todos los procesos de la compañía.
Funciones
Mejora de los procesos de la compañía bajo la perspectiva Lean Thinking: hacer más con menos”.
Implantación de trabajo estandarizado utilizando herramientas Lean.
Impulsar el cambio cultural y formar a toda la organización en Lean Thinking y herramientas de fabricación Lean.
Desarrollar la visibilidad de las iniciativas Lean para mostrar nuestras capacidades frente a los clientes.
Aplicación de herramientas Lean en el área de Gestión de Proyectos y Ofertas, con el objetivo de optimizar el equilibrado de líneas y promover la automatización mediante tecnologías avanzadas (visión artificial, inteligencia robótica, etc.).
Dar soporte a la organización global y desarrollar a sus miembros en metodologías Lean y de fabricación mediante actividades de formación y transferencia de conocimiento. En caso de asignación, formar y desarrollar perfiles junior.
Proporcionar soporte técnico adicional en Lean Manufacturing a otros recursos globales (departamentos o unidades de negocio de Intelligent Robots).
Identificar oportunidades para reducir costes de proyectos y realizar el seguimiento del rendimiento respecto a los presupuestos establecidos.
Orientación al cliente en la resolución de problemas técnicos, ofertas y solicitudes técnicas, siguiendo la estrategia de innovación.
Colaborar estrechamente con el responsable de ofertas (Quote Owner) y el KAM para entregar propuestas en plazo y aportar mayor valor añadido frente a la competencia desde una perspectiva centrada en el cliente.
Aplicación de metodologías de tiempos y simulación para el análisis de ciclos de fabricación y propuesta de acciones correctivas.
Dar soporte a los Program Managers en la validación de procesos de nuevos equipos para su aprobación en las instalaciones de fabricación de los clientes.
Proporcionar soporte técnico en presentaciones comerciales y en la exposición de propuestas/ofertas.
Elaboración de informes de lecciones aprendidas para futuros análisis y mejora continua.
Liderar casos de resolución de problemas e implementar acciones correctivas basadas en análisis de causa raíz.
Identificar soluciones tecnológicas para mejorar la productividad y el rendimiento de fabricación.
Liderar el análisis de datos de producción mediante correlaciones, regresiones y análisis de variabilidad.
Beneficios
Seguro médico
Oportunidades de formación: Idiomas, Certificaciones, Bootcamps y mucho más
Multitud de eventos: BETWEEN Night, Torneo de Padel y mucho más
Retribución flexible (restaurant, transporte, guardería)
Incentivos por validar o recomendar talento
jobs.tailored_advice: Para destacar en esta posición, tu CV debe enfatizar tu experiencia liderando proyectos de mejora continua bajo metodologías Lean. Dado que la oferta menciona específicamente visión artificial y robótica, resalta cualquier proyecto donde hayas integrado automatización con Lean. Incluye ejemplos concretos de reducción de costes y optimización de tiempos de ciclo. Si tienes experiencia formando equipos o gestionando el cambio cultural, asegúrate de detallarlo, ya que es una función clave del puesto. Finalmente, adapta tu perfil para mostrar una mentalidad orientada a cliente y soporte comercial, no solo técnica.
jobs.cover_letter:
La combinación de mi formación en Ingeniería de Tecnologías Industriales y mi especialización en desarrollo de software me permite abordar los retos de Lean Manufacturing desde una perspectiva técnica y analítica única. He seguido de cerca la labor de BETWEEN en la integración de soluciones tecnológicas avanzadas, y estoy convencido de que mi capacidad para implementar herramientas de automatización y visión artificial puede aportar un valor diferencial a sus proyectos en Manresa.

En mis proyectos personales, he aplicado metodologías de optimización y automatización, utilizando herramientas como Matlab/Simulink para el análisis de procesos y desarrollando soluciones de software que mejoran la eficiencia operativa. Mi experiencia integrando inteligencia artificial y algoritmos de recomendación se alinea directamente con su objetivo de impulsar la inteligencia robótica y la mejora continua en los ciclos de fabricación.

Me motiva especialmente la posibilidad de aplicar el Lean Thinking para optimizar el equilibrado de líneas y reducir costes, apoyándome en mi destreza técnica para el análisis de datos y la simulación. Mi perfil combina la rigurosidad de la ingeniería industrial con la agilidad de un desarrollador full-stack, lo que me permite no solo identificar ineficiencias, sino también programar soluciones tecnológicas a medida.

Me encantaría tener la oportunidad de conversar sobre cómo mi enfoque proactivo y mi capacidad de aprendizaje rápido pueden contribuir al éxito de su equipo de Operaciones. ¿Podríamos agendar una breve llamada la próxima semana para profundizar en cómo mi perfil encaja con sus necesidades actuales?
jobs.cv_summary: Estudiante de Ingeniería Industrial y Desarrollo de Software con sólida base en Lean Thinking, simulación y automatización. Experto en integrar IA y visión artificial en entornos productivos, con capacidad técnica para optimizar procesos, analizar datos de fabricación y desarrollar soluciones tecnológicas que maximizan la eficiencia operativa.

jobs.title: Freelance Copywriter
jobs.description:
CT Marketing Agency is seeking skilled Freelance Copywriters to write high-quality, SEO-driven content for eCommerce and lead generation websites. This is a freelance, project-based writing role.

 

The ideal candidate has excellent English writing skills, strong research ability, and experience writing content that follows detailed, client-specific guidelines. Projects commonly include category pages, product descriptions, blog posts, SEO landing pages, and website copy.

 

About the Role

Our client base is constantly evolving, and writers may create content across a wide range of industries, including:

  • Fashion, including mass-market and luxury brands
  • Skincare and beauty
  • Tech and software
  • Finance and investing
  • Law, including family law, divorce, and product liability
  • Education
  • Home improvement
  • Automobiles and motorcycles
  • Health and wellness
  • Medical and clinical fields
  • Digital marketing
  • SEO, PR, advertising, and marketing

Writers with experience in highly specialized industries such as tech, finance, law, health, medical, SEO, PR, advertising, or marketing are strongly encouraged to apply.

Responsibilities
  • Write clear, engaging, SEO-friendly content for eCommerce and lead generation websites
  • Create category pages, product descriptions, blog posts, landing pages, and website copy
  • Research client industries, products, services, audiences, and competitors
  • Follow detailed client guidelines and adapt to different brand voices
  • Blend SEO best practices with brand priorities and conversion-focused writing
  • Complete assignments by deadline and communicate professionally with the team

Qualifications
  • Excellent English writing, grammar, editing, and proofreading skills
  • 2 to 4 years of professional, non-academic writing experience preferred
  • Strong understanding of SEO writing best practices
  • Ability to research unfamiliar industries and technical topics
  • Ability to write creative, engaging, accurate, and ROI-focused content
  • Portfolio featuring published work preferred
  • Experience in specialized industries strongly preferred

Compensation

Writers are paid on a per-word basis. Rates are assessed according to our KPI rubric.

Initial compensation is up to $0.06 per word, with $0.034 per word being the most typical rate

This equals approximately $30 or $17 per 500-word page

After 400 live pages, the top rate increases to $0.064 per word, with $0.038 per word being the most typical rate

After 800 live pages, the top rate increases to $0.07 per word, with $0.044 per word being the most typical rate

 

Application Process

Candidates should be prepared to provide a portfolio featuring published work. Once an offer is extended, writers will complete a brief training course.
jobs.tailored_advice: To stand out, curate a portfolio that specifically highlights your ability to adapt to different brand voices across diverse industries like tech, finance, or health. Since they emphasize SEO-driven content, explicitly mention your experience with keyword integration, meta descriptions, and conversion-focused writing techniques. If you have experience writing for eCommerce, showcase specific examples of product descriptions or category pages that improved engagement or sales. Finally, emphasize your research skills and your ability to follow strict style guides, as this is critical for their project-based workflow.
jobs.cover_letter:
As a software developer with a deep interest in digital communication and technical content, I have spent the last few years building functional web platforms like 'El Grano de Oro' and 'Catering SanMor'. These projects required me to bridge the gap between complex technical architecture and user-facing copy, ensuring that every product description and landing page was optimized for both clarity and conversion. My background in full-stack development allows me to understand the technical requirements of SEO-driven content from the inside out.

I am particularly drawn to this role because it demands the same precision I apply to my code. Whether I am documenting software features or crafting engaging descriptions for e-commerce, I prioritize accuracy and brand voice. My C1 English proficiency and experience in researching technical topics—ranging from AI integration to automated workflows—ensure that I can quickly adapt to the diverse industries your agency serves, from tech and finance to specialized professional services.

I am eager to bring my analytical mindset and writing skills to CT Marketing Agency. I am confident that my ability to distill complex information into compelling, SEO-friendly copy will add immediate value to your projects. I would love to discuss how my technical background can help elevate your client content. Are you available for a brief call next week to discuss the next steps?

jobs.title: Programador Senior BPM
jobs.description:
¡Estamos ampliando el equipo de Azertium IT y queremos contar contigo!

Nos urge incorporar un Programador Senior con experiencia en la herramienta de desarrollo BPM de IBM, concretamente en entornos BAW (Business Automation Workflow).

Modalidad de trabajo: 100% remoto.

Únete a nosotros!
Requisitos mínimos: 
Experiencia en desarrollo BPM de IBM, concretamente en entornos BAW (Business Automation Workflow).
Orientado a desarrollo BACK, con experiencia sólida en Java, valorándose adicionalmente conocimientos en tecnologías frontend como JavaScript, HTML y CSS.
Se valorará especialmente experiencia previa en proyectos del sector banca.
jobs.tailored_advice: Resalta en tu CV proyectos específicos donde hayas implementado flujos de trabajo en IBM BAW. Dado que buscan un perfil orientado a backend, detalla tu experiencia con Java y cómo has integrado servicios o APIs dentro de la plataforma BPM. Si tienes experiencia en el sector banca, menciónala explícitamente al inicio de tu perfil, ya que es un factor determinante para esta posición.
jobs.cover_letter: La automatización de procesos y la eficiencia operativa son áreas que me apasionan profundamente, por lo que la oportunidad de unirme a Azertium IT como desarrollador en entornos IBM BAW resulta sumamente atractiva. Mi perfil combina una sólida base técnica en Java, lenguaje fundamental para el desarrollo backend en Business Automation Workflow, con una capacidad demostrada para implementar soluciones full-stack utilizando JavaScript, HTML y CSS en proyectos reales ya desplegados. A pesar de mi juventud, mi enfoque autodidacta me ha permitido integrar arquitecturas complejas y herramientas de IA en aplicaciones funcionales, lo que me otorga la agilidad necesaria para adaptarme rápidamente a los flujos de trabajo de IBM BPM. Soy una persona orientada a resultados, acostumbrada a resolver problemas técnicos de forma independiente y con un nivel de inglés C1 que me permite operar sin barreras en entornos internacionales. Estoy convencido de que mi capacidad de aprendizaje y mi rigor técnico me permitirán aportar valor inmediato a sus proyectos de automatización. Me encantaría tener la oportunidad de conversar sobre cómo mi experiencia en desarrollo de software y mi entusiasmo por la tecnología pueden contribuir al éxito del equipo de Azertium IT. Quedo a su entera disposición para concertar una entrevista y profundizar en cómo encajo en sus necesidades actuales.

jobs.title: Solution Developer
jobs.description:
Kongsberg Maritime is a global technology leader in the maritime industry, delivering innovative and sustainable solutions that enhance safety, efficiency and performance at sea. As a world-leading company, we are driving the transition towards safer, smarter and more sustainable oceans, helping our customers solve complex challenges and shape the future of maritime operations.
We are seeking a Solution Developer (AI Platform) as responsible for Kongsberg Maritime’s artificial intelligence infrastructure. The role designs, develops, and operates scalable AI platforms that support the organization’s data, automation, and advanced analytics initiatives.
With a code-first and automate-everything mindset, the Solution Developer acts as the AI technical authority across IT, business, and data teams, ensuring platform availability, security, regulatory compliance, and the adoption of cutting-edge AI technologies in production environments.
 Responsibilities
Technical and operational AI Platform leadership
Collaboration with IT & business stakeholders
Design, develop, and maintain scalable AI infrastructure.
Ensure high availability of AI systems.
Automate deployment pipelines for CI/CD
Implement monitoring and logging for AI systems to ensure operation
Ensure AI platforms and solutions comply with security and data privacy regulations.
Implement and maintain best practices for data protection and security.
Stay updated with the latest advancements in AI technologies and platforms.
Qualifications and Qualities
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Have a code-first/automate-everything attitude
Relevant degree or diploma programme of study. 
Experience in AI design & development
Preferred experience with Azure & Snowflake
Preferred experience writing Python, PowerShell & bicep code
Experience of working to DevOps / MLOps principles
Familiarity with the Git & DevOps version control platforms.
Troubleshooting experience in virtual / cloud infrastructures 
Effective communication skills in English — essential for coordination with international teams B2/C1)
Experience: mid-senior, Junior also welcome to apply. 
What we can offer:
The opportunity to work in a global technology leader, contributing to innovative and sustainable solutions in the maritime industry.
Flexible compensation scheme (optional salary package)
Additional days off or extra vacation days (22+7)
A collaborative and international work environment, with close interaction with teams across different countries.
Continuous learning and development opportunities, including access to new technologies and professional growth.
Flexible working arrangements and a healthy work-life balance.
A supportive and inclusive culture that values diversity, teamwork, and knowledge sharing

jobs.title: Staff Software Engineer, Product (Montevideo)
jobs.description:
This is a remote role for candidates located in Montevideo, Uruguay. 

 

About LawnStarter

LawnStarter is the nation's leading on-demand marketplace for lawn care and outdoor services, with over $100M in annual bookings. We're expanding beyond lawn care to become the one-stop shop for all home services — operating across three brands (LawnStarter, Lawn Love, Home Gnome) on a single shared platform.

About Engineering at LawnStarter

We build in small, focused initiative teams: a Product Engineer working alongside a PM and a designer, supported by an Engineering Manager who helps you grow. You'll also work shoulder-to-shoulder with engineering peers across initiatives in a shared codebase. The whole team owns whether the work moves its metric.

AI coding agents are a force multiplier here — they give a small, senior team the leverage to ship more, faster, and at a higher bar for quality. We hire engineers who are wired for ownership and energized by shipping to a real marketplace with customers and pros on both sides.

 

The Role

You're the engineering anchor of an initiative — working as part of a tight team with your PM and designer, and alongside engineering peers on adjacent initiatives. You have a hand in the full lifecycle: shaping the problem, deciding the technical approach, directing AI agents to implement much of the code, shipping to production, and — with your team — owning the outcome.

You're measured by impact, not by lines of code merged. When an agent can ship something safely, your job is to make sure it's done right and the metric moves. When the work calls for careful, hand-written code in a sensitive area, you write it yourself.

What makes this role exciting:

  • You ship end-to-end. From problem-framing through production to the post-launch metric review — you see the whole arc and own the result with your team.
  • You work as a true product partner. You sit at the table with PM and design, bringing engineering judgment to product calls and product sense to engineering calls.
  • You get real autonomy — with the right checkpoints. You make most technical calls yourself, with architect review on significant architectural decisions and fast input from peers.
  • You operate at a staff bar. You're trusted to make the call, ship the hard thing, and stand behind the outcome.

 

What You'll Own

 

  • The technical approach — architecture, data model, integration choices, rollout plan, observability, and rollback strategy for your initiative. You make most calls yourself and bring significant architectural decisions to architect review; you document them, and revisit if the data says you were wrong.
  • Implementation quality — the prompts, guardrails, evals, tests, and review loop that let agents ship safe, correct, production-ready code. Most lines will be agent-authored, and you're accountable for them — held to the same standard as the rest of the team working in a shared codebase.
  • Cross-functional partnership — daily working contact with your PM (scope, tradeoffs) and designer (UX decisions, in-tool prototyping), regular collaboration with engineering peers, and weekly check-ins with your EM.
  • The initiative outcome — the metric the initiative was set up to move. With your PM, you present results 2–4 weeks post-launch and share the "did it work" answer.
  • A high bar for what ships — production correctness, security, performance, observability, and the experience for customers and pros. Agents accelerate you; they don't lower the bar.

 

Problems to Solve

 

Leading AI agents at a staff-level quality bar Most of the code on your initiative will be authored by AI agents. The craft is making them ship as if a senior engineer wrote it: prompts that encode our conventions, evals that catch issues before merge, tests that exercise the edges, observability that catches a regression before a customer does. How do you build a workflow that lets a small team ship far more than its size would suggest?

Owning decisions with high autonomy You have real latitude to make and document technical calls quickly — with architect review on the big architectural ones and peers to pressure-test your thinking. How do you move fast, keep your team aligned, and stay accountable to the outcome?

Shipping outcomes, not features Each initiative is measured by a metric — a conversion rate, a retention curve, a pro-funnel KPI, a unit-economics shift. You're accountable for the number alongside your team. How do you scope to actually move it, decide what *not* to build, and have the discipline to follow up 2–4 weeks after launch?

 

What Success Looks Like (Year 1)

 

  • Initiative outcomes hit — You've shipped 3–4 initiatives end-to-end, and at least two clearly moved their metric (with the post-launch review to prove it).
  • Agent workflow that travels — The prompts, evals, and review loop you built are picked up by peers on other initiatives.
  • Faster cycle time — Median time from problem-framing to first production rollout on your initiatives is meaningfully shorter.
  • Quality holds — No customer- or pro-facing regression traceable to agent-authored code that slipped through your review.
  • Visible leverage — Peers point to artifacts you left behind — runbooks, evals, agent workflows, post-launch write-ups — as references they use.



Requirements

Who You Are

 

  • AI-native. Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, or equivalent are how you ship today — daily, on production work. You have real opinions about prompts, evals, agent loops, and review workflows, and you know when to let the agent run versus write it yourself.
  • Operating at a lead level. Whatever your current title, you've been the person making the call, shipping the hard thing, and standing behind whether it worked.
  • Outcome-driven. You measure your week in "did the metric move" and "did the experience get better." You read the post-launch dashboard and own the answer.
  • A strong horizontal partner. You hold your own with a strong PM and designer, and you collaborate well with engineering peers in a shared codebase. You bring engineering judgment to product calls and product judgment to engineering calls.
  • Decisive and documented. You make architecture, data-model, and rollout calls, write them down, get fast input, and move.
  • A force multiplier. Your impact compounds beyond your own initiative because you leave reusable artifacts behind — agent workflows, evals, runbooks, post-launch reviews.
  • Customer- and pro-minded. This is a real marketplace with real people on both sides, and you care about the outcomes for both.

 

Good to Know

 

  • An individual-contributor role with room to grow. People management sits with the EM — but the path into management is an open door for those who want it.
  • A product-engineering role, end-to-end. You ship features that move metrics; platform and architecture work happen inside the initiative when the outcome needs them.
  • Hands-on, with a high quality bar. Agents handle much of the implementation; you bring the judgment, design, safety, and accountability. The bar is high.
  • Shipping to a live marketplace. With $100M+ in bookings, customers and pros use what you ship within the same week.

 

Tech You'll Touch

 

  • AI agents — Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, internal agent stack, MCP servers, evals tooling
  • Backend — PHP/Laravel
  • Frontend — TypeScript/React/React Native (customer & pro apps, web and mobile)
  • Data — Redshift, dbt, Segment, Airflow
  • Infra — AWS, Datadog, Sentry, GitHub Actions
  • Documentation & process — Brain (Claude Code skills + docs repo), Confluence, Jira

You don't need every box checked. You need deep skill in at least one of our stacks plus credible production experience with AI coding agents.



Benefits

  • Competitive salary of USD $80,000–$100,000 annual base
  • Work from anywhere
  • High ownership and autonomy
  • Fast-moving team that loves to build, learn, and grow
jobs.tailored_advice: This role is for a Staff-level engineer, which is significantly more senior than your current profile. To improve your chances, emphasize your 'AI-native' workflow: explicitly mention how you use Cursor or Claude Code in your daily development. Since the role requires PHP/Laravel and React, highlight any experience you have with these or explain your ability to learn them rapidly. Focus your CV on 'outcomes' and 'metrics' rather than just 'features' built.

 ¿Qué buscamos en ti?
Experiencia de al menos 3 años en desarrollo backend con Python 3.x de forma avanzada (asyncio, typing, Pydantic) y frameworks principales (FastAPI, Flask o Django).

Sólida experiencia con ecosistema AWS: diseño de arquitecturas serverless y contenerizadas, escalables y tolerantes a fallos utilizando Lambda, API Gateway, ECS/EKS, SQS/SNS, EventBridge, DynamoDB/RDS, S3, CloudWatch y Cognito.

Dominio de buenas prácticas de ingeniería: diseño de APIs (REST/GraphQL), testing (pytest), patrones de diseño (DDD, arquitectura hexagonal, clean code), contenedores (Docker) e Infraestructura como Código (Terraform o CloudFormation).

Habilidades DevOps & CI/CD: pipeline de integración y despliegue continuo (GitHub Actions, CodePipeline) y observabilidad (OpenTelemetry, logs estructurados, X-Ray).

Liderazgo técnico y soft skills: capacidad para tomar decisiones arquitectónicas, realizar revisiones de código (code reviews), mentorizar a perfiles más junior y colaborar estrechamente con equipos de Producto y DevOps con foco en seguridad, rendimiento y optimización de costes.
 ¿Qué podemos valorar?
Experiencia práctica en la gestión de dependencias y empaquetado (Poetry, pip).
Uso y configuración de herramientas de calidad de código, formateo y seguridad (mypy, ruff, black, Bandit, secret scanning) junto con perfilado de rendimiento (performance profiling).
Nivel de inglés medio.
¿Listo/a para unirte a un equipo que apuesta por la innovación y el crecimiento profesional? Envíanos tu CV y hagamos match.
jobs.tailored_advice: Dado que tu match score es bajo, es crucial que estructures tu CV destacando proyectos donde hayas aplicado arquitectura hexagonal o DDD con Python. Asegúrate de incluir una sección específica de 'Infraestructura y Cloud' donde listes explícitamente tu experiencia con AWS (Lambda, ECS, SQS) y Terraform, ya que son requisitos críticos. Si tienes experiencia con herramientas de calidad como Ruff o Mypy, añádelas para demostrar que sigues las buenas prácticas que solicitan. Finalmente, enfatiza tu capacidad de mentoría o liderazgo técnico para justificar el perfil senior que buscan.

jobs.title: Técnico/a Senior de Aplicaciones Java y AWS (TELETRABAJO)
jobs.description:
Sobre nosotros 
En Factum llevamos más de 15 años prestando servicios tecnológicos, de ciberseguridad, ciberinteligencia y servicios gestionados a más de 100 clientes. Apostamos por la innovación, la mejora continua y un buen ambiente de trabajo. 

Tu misión 
Buscamos cinco perfiles senior de Application Developer Java & Web Technologies para incorporarse a un proyecto de mantenimiento de aplicaciones bancarias, microservicios y Spring Boot en AWS para uno de nuestros principales clientes. 

¿Qué harás en tu día a día? 
Mantener y dar soporte a aplicaciones backend y microservicios. 
Monitorizar servicios y aplicaciones en AWS y CloudWatch. 
Resolver incidencias relacionadas con APIs, Kubernetes/EKS y sistemas distribuidos. 
Supervisar procesos Kafka, RabbitMQ, batch y bases de datos cloud. 
Participar en la gestión de incidentes y procedimientos ITSM. 
Dar soporte a procesos de tarjetas, pagos, autorización y procesamiento de transacciones. 

¿Qué buscamos? 
Al menos 4 años de experiencia en mantenimiento u operación de aplicaciones Java. 
Experiencia con Java, Spring Boot, microservicios y AWS. 
Conocimientos de CloudWatch, Kubernetes/EKS y API Gateway. 
Experiencia con Kafka, Confluent, MSK o RabbitMQ. 
Conocimientos de Aurora, RDS, DynamoDB o DocumentDB. 
Experiencia en observabilidad, procesos batch e ITSM. 
Conocimiento funcional del sector de tarjetas y medios de pago. 
Inglés alto imprescindible. 
Disponibilidad para trabajar en turnos 24x7 y realizar guardias. 
Portugués valorable. 

Condiciones 
Contrato indefinido. 
Modalidad remota. 
Jornada por turnos 24x7. 

¿Por qué Factum? 
Empresa consolidada y en crecimiento. 
Proyectos tecnológicos especializados. 
Beneficios de retribución flexible. 
Entorno joven, colaborativo e inclusivo. 
¡Estamos deseando conocerte!
jobs.tailored_advice: Dado que el puesto es para el sector bancario y requiere soporte 24x7, destaca en tu CV cualquier experiencia previa en entornos críticos o de alta disponibilidad. Es fundamental que resaltes tu dominio de Java y Spring Boot, pero también debes enfatizar tu capacidad de resolución de incidencias en AWS (CloudWatch, EKS). Si tienes experiencia en el sector de medios de pago o tarjetas, ponlo en la parte superior de tu perfil. Asegúrate de mencionar explícitamente tu nivel de inglés, ya que es un requisito imprescindible, y si tienes disponibilidad real para turnos rotativos, inclúyelo como una fortaleza operativa.
jobs.cover_letter: La combinación de mi formación técnica en desarrollo de aplicaciones y mi capacidad autodidacta para desplegar soluciones en producción encaja con el dinamismo que Factum busca para sus proyectos bancarios. Aunque mi trayectoria profesional está en una etapa inicial, cuento con una base sólida en Java y una gran facilidad para aprender entornos complejos, lo que me permite abordar el mantenimiento de microservicios y sistemas distribuidos con la seriedad que requiere el sector financiero. Mi experiencia integrando APIs y gestionando despliegues me ha dado una visión práctica sobre la importancia de la observabilidad y la eficiencia en el código. Estoy muy motivado por profundizar en el ecosistema AWS, Kubernetes y Kafka, tecnologías que ya forman parte de mis objetivos de especialización técnica. Poseo un nivel de inglés C1, lo que me permite operar con fluidez en entornos internacionales y manejar documentación técnica avanzada sin barreras. Me entusiasma la posibilidad de aportar mi capacidad de resolución de problemas y mi compromiso con la calidad del software en un entorno de alta exigencia como el vuestro. Me encantaría tener la oportunidad de conversar sobre cómo mi perfil, orientado a la mejora continua y al aprendizaje acelerado, puede contribuir al éxito de vuestro equipo de soporte y mantenimiento.
